function: Describe the sequential steps of a proposed algorithm.
template: Алгоритм решения задачи обратной гомогенизации реализуется в следующие шаги: 1) ___; 2) ___; ...
when_to_use: When detailing a specific computational algorithm within the methodology.
common_mistakes: Describing steps in a non-logical order.

function: Define the inputs and outputs of a specific computational module.
template: Модуль для расчёта эффективных свойств принимает на вход ___ и возвращает ___
when_to_use: To specify interfaces between different parts of the CAD system.
common_mistakes: Using undefined or ambiguous terms for inputs/outputs.

function: Provide a high-level overview of the automated design process or workflow.
template: Предлагаемая методология автоматизированного проектирования включает следующие основные этапы: ___
when_to_use: To give the reader a roadmap of the proposed solution in Chapter 2.
common_mistakes: Overcomplicating the overview with too many technical details upfront.

function: State the key assumptions of the proposed model.
template: Модель построена на следующих основных предположениях: ___
when_to_use: When describing a new computational model for homogenization or design.
common_mistakes: Omitting critical assumptions that limit the model's applicability.

template: Для описания свойств композиционного материала введём следующие обозначения: ___
when_to_use: At the beginning of a chapter presenting a new model or formalism.
common_mistakes: Inconsistent use of notation throughout the dissertation.

function: Define the criteria for evaluating or comparing existing methods.
template: Сравнение методов может быть проведено по следующим критериям: ___
when_to_use: When setting up a comparative analysis in the literature review.
common_mistakes: Using criteria that are not directly relevant to the research problem.

function: Identify the research or methodological gap.
template: В существующих работах недостаточно внимания уделено ___
when_to_use: To transition from the literature review to the proposed methodology.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap that is not substantiated by the review.

function: Point out the limitations of previously developed software or systems.
template: Разработанные ранее системы (например, [REF]) характеризуются следующими ограничениями: ___
when_to_use: To justify the need for the proposed CAD system.
common_mistakes: Being overly critical without acknowledging strengths.

function: Present a classification or taxonomy of existing approaches.
template: В обзоре выделяют следующие подходы к ___: ___
when_to_use: In a literature review chapter to structure the analysis of prior work.
common_mistakes: Creating an arbitrary classification without clear criteria.

template: Учитывая вышесказанное, можно перейти к рассмотрению ___
when_to_use: To connect the conclusion of one idea to the start of another.

function: Open a new section with a clear signpost.
template: В следующем разделе рассматривается ___
when_to_use: To create a logical flow between sections of the dissertation.
common_mistakes: Abruptly starting a new section without connecting it to the previous one.

function: 描述用于评估的数据集特征和来源
template: Для оценки эффективности предлагаемого подхода использован датасет ___. Он содержит ___
when_to_use: 实验部分开头，介绍实验数据
common_mistakes: 数据集描述不全，未说明规模、特点

function: 在引言结尾预览论文的主要贡献
template: В результате выполненной работы предложены и реализованы ___
when_to_use: 引言末尾，让读者对创新点有预期
common_mistakes: 贡献罗列过于琐碎，未突出核心创新

function: 阐述研究领域发展的宏观背景与需求
template: Развитие ___ приводит к необходимости ___
when_to_use: 论文开头，建立研究背景的紧迫性
common_mistakes: 背景过于宽泛，未与具体问题关联

function: 概括本研究旨在实现的总体目标
template: Целью настоящей работы является разработка ___ для ___
when_to_use: 在问题陈述后，明确论文目标
common_mistakes: 目标描述过于抽象，缺乏可衡量性

function: 列举为实现目标所分解的具体研究任务
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: 在阐述总目标后，列出具体任务
common_mistakes: 任务列表过长或与目标关联不强

function: 简要说明论文各章节的安排
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав и заключения. В Главе 1 ___
when_to_use: 引言最后，提供全文导航
common_mistakes: 描述过于简略，缺少各章核心内容的简述

function: 分步骤描述核心算法的执行过程
template: Алгоритм работает следующим образом: 1. ___; 2. ___; 3. ___
when_to_use: 详细阐述算法实现逻辑时
common_mistakes: 步骤描述不精确，存在歧义

function: 补充说明影响实现的软件/硬件细节
template: Реализация системы была выполнена с использованием ___. Для этого ___
when_to_use: 方法章节，提供可复现的工程细节
common_mistakes: 细节描述不足，无法复现

function: 明确方法的输入和输出数据
template: На вход алгоритма подаются данные формата ___. Результатом является ___
when_to_use: 描述方法模块时，说明数据流向
common_mistakes: 输入输出定义模糊，未考虑边界情况

function: 说明方法中关键参数的选择依据或经验值
template: Значение параметра ___ было установлено равным ___, что обосновано ___
when_to_use: 在算法描述中，解释参数设置
common_mistakes: 参数选择缺乏理论或实验依据

function: 描述所提方法或系统的整体流程
template: Предложенная система состоит из следующих блоков: ___, ___, и ___
when_to_use: 方法章节开头，给出整体框架
common_mistakes: 流程描述混乱，模块间逻辑关系不清

function: 陈述建立理论模型或算法时所做的基本假设
template: При построении модели были сделаны следующие предположения: ___
when_to_use: 理论章节开头，界定模型适用范围
common_mistakes: 假设列举不全或过于理想化

function: 引入关键的符号或变量定义
template: Введем обозначение ___ для обозначения ___
when_to_use: 理论推导开始前，统一符号系统
common_mistakes: 符号定义分散，不易查询

function: 比较不同方案的优缺点
template: Рассмотрим подход A и подход B. Преимущество подхода A заключается в ___
when_to_use: 文献综述中，分析关键方法的异同
common_mistakes: 比较维度单一，未进行多角度分析

function: 明确指出当前研究中尚未解决的空白点
template: Из анализа литературы следует, что остается нерешенной задача ___
when_to_use: 文献综述结尾，为自身研究定位
common_mistakes: 所谓“空白”不够明确或已被间接解决

function: 指出已有工作存在的普遍局限性
template: Основным ограничением большинства существующих решений является ___
when_to_use: 在比较分析后，总结领域痛点
common_mistakes: 批评过于笼统，缺乏具体引用支持

function: 说明本研究在已知文献中的定位和差异
template: В отличие от работ [X, Y], предложенный подход фокусируется на ___
when_to_use: 在指出研究空白后，明确自身创新位置
common_mistakes: 定位描述模糊，与已有工作的区别不明显

function: 对现有方法或技术进行分类综述
template: Подходы к решению задачи ___ можно классифицировать на группы: ___
when_to_use: 文献综述开头，建立分析框架
common_mistakes: 分类标准不清晰或重叠

template: The main scientific contributions include: ___, ___, and ___
when_to_use: Enumerating contributions in conclusion

template: Future work should focus on ___ and ___ to improve ___
when_to_use: Suggesting future research directions

function: Stating limitations of the developed system
template: The current implementation has the following limitations: ___
slots: limited number of simultaneously recorded segments
when_to_use: Acknowledging limitations in conclusion

template: The work resulted in the development of a ___ system that enables ___
slots: spatial-temporal mapping of vascular tone type
when_to_use: Opening the conclusion with main result

function: Explaining the mechanism of signal formation
template: The observed changes in bioimpedance signals can be attributed to ___ caused by ___
when_to_use: Interpreting experimental observations

template: The sensitivity of the method to ___ was evaluated, showing that ___ affects ___ by ___
when_to_use: Discussing method sensitivity and confounders

template: Increasing the number of electrodes improves ___ at the cost of ___
when_to_use: Discussing design tradeoffs

template: A database of signals was formed from recordings of ___ healthy volunteers across ___ segments of the limbs
when_to_use: Describing experimental data collection

template: To ensure reproducibility, all measurements were performed under ___ conditions with ___
when_to_use: Addressing experimental reliability

template: The research protocol included ___ phases: baseline recording for ___ min, followed by ___
when_to_use: Describing experimental protocol design

template: Vascular tone is defined as the degree of ___ of the vascular wall, determined by ___
slots: the balance of sympathetic and parasympathetic influences
when_to_use: Introducing formal definitions

template: Let ___ represent the bioimpedance signal recorded from the ___ segment of the ___
when_to_use: Introducing measurement notation

function: Stating the need for improved vascular monitoring systems
template: The need for ___ systems capable of ___ remains an urgent task in modern ___
when_to_use: Opening a dissertation introduction to justify the work
common_mistakes: Too vague motivation without specifying domain

template: The objective of this work is to develop a ___ system for ___ based on ___
when_to_use: Formulating the thesis objective

function: Defining the core problem in vascular tone assessment
template: Current methods for assessing ___ of the ___ do not provide sufficient ___
slots: the predominant type of vascular tone
when_to_use: Stating the research problem in introduction

template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks were set: ___
slots: analysis of existing methods; theoretical justification; algorithm development; experimental validation
when_to_use: Enumerating research tasks after objective

function: Describing the signal filtering algorithm steps
template: The filtering algorithm includes: ___ of the raw signal, followed by ___ and ___
when_to_use: Detailing algorithm implementation steps

function: Defining input and output of the analysis algorithm
template: The algorithm takes ___ as input and produces ___ as output
slots: a spatial map of predominant vascular tone type
when_to_use: Clarifying algorithm interface

template: The optimal electrode configuration was determined by varying ___ and evaluating ___
slots: the signal-to-noise ratio at each segment
when_to_use: Describing parameter selection methodology

template: The proposed algorithm consists of the following stages: ___, ___, and ___
when_to_use: Overview of the methodological pipeline

function: Stating assumptions about signal formation mechanisms
template: The analysis assumes that the formation of rheograms is governed by ___
slots: pulsatile blood volume changes in the vascular bed
when_to_use: Declaring modeling assumptions in theoretical section

template: Measurements are conducted under conditions where ___ is maintained constant at ___
when_to_use: Specifying measurement conditions

template: Let ___ denote the ___ measured at the ___ segment of the limb
when_to_use: Introducing mathematical notation for key quantities

template: The proposed method demonstrated a ___% improvement in ___ compared to conventional ___
when_to_use: Quantifying performance gains

template: The mean value of ___ was ___ ± ___ for the ___ group
when_to_use: Reporting quantitative experimental results

function: Comparing invasive and noninvasive measurement methods
template: Compared to ___ methods, ___ approaches offer ___ but suffer from ___
when_to_use: Comparing methodological approaches in survey

function: Identifying the research gap in continuous monitoring
template: Despite significant progress in ___, there is still a lack of methods for ___
when_to_use: Stating the gap that motivates the research
common_mistakes: Gap too narrow to justify a dissertation
Gap already addressed in recent work

function: Describing limitations of existing instrumental methods
template: Existing instrumental methods for investigating ___ have the following limitations: ___
slots: limited spatial resolution, long acquisition time
when_to_use: Summarizing gaps in prior work
common_mistakes: Being too critical of established methods

function: Positioning the bioimpedance method among alternatives
template: The bioimpedance method occupies a unique position among ___ due to its ability to ___
when_to_use: Positioning the chosen approach relative to alternatives

function: Presenting classification of vascular tone types
template: Vascular tone is classified into ___ types depending on ___
slots: the predominance of certain vascular segments
when_to_use: Introducing a taxonomy in literature review

template: Chapter ___ is devoted to ___ of the ___
when_to_use: Transitioning between chapters

function: Identify the baseline methods for comparison.
template: В качестве метода сравнения был выбран ___ .
when_to_use: To establish a benchmark for evaluation.
common_mistakes: Using an outdated or weak baseline.

function: Describe the dataset or experimental data used.
template: Экспериментальные данные были получены на базе ___ .
when_to_use: To set the context for the experimental evaluation.
common_mistakes: Insufficient description of data sources or characteristics.

function: Define the metrics used to evaluate performance.
template: Качество работы системы оценивалось по ___ .
when_to_use: To specify how success is measured.

function: Describe the design of an experimental scenario or test setup.
template: Для проверки ___ был разработан следующий сценарий эксперимента: ___ .
when_to_use: To detail how a specific hypothesis or claim is tested.
common_mistakes: Scenario does not test the intended claim.

function: Preview the main contributions of the work.
template: Основными результатами работы являются: ___ .
when_to_use: To give the reader a summary of what the thesis achieves.

function: Introduce the research problem and its significance.
template: Актуальность проблемы ___ определяется необходимостью ___ .
when_to_use: In the introduction to justify why the topic is important.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the specific need.

function: Define the primary objective of the study.
template: Целью работы является ___ .
when_to_use: To state the main aim directly.

function: State the core research problem to be solved.
template: В данной работе решается задача ___ .
when_to_use: To clearly state the main goal of the research.

template: Для достижения поставленной цели решаются следующие задачи: ___ .
when_to_use: To break down the objective into actionable steps.

function: Outline the structure of the dissertation.
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ , заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: To guide the reader through the document's organization.
common_mistakes: Merely listing chapter numbers without brief description.

function: Outline a plan for testing the impact of different components.
template: Для оценки влияния ___ на результат была проведена серия экспериментов ___ .
when_to_use: In the experimental design section to show thoroughness.

function: Describe the sequential steps of an algorithm.
template: Алгоритм обработки данных состоит из следующих шагов: ___ .
when_to_use: To detail a computational procedure.
common_mistakes: Steps are not logically ordered or clear.

function: Provide specific details about the physical or software implementation.
template: В качестве ___ используется ___ .
when_to_use: To describe concrete hardware or software components.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the implementation.

function: Define the inputs and outputs of a component or algorithm.
template: На вход блока ___ поступает ___ , на выходе формируется ___ .
when_to_use: To specify the data flow in a system architecture.
common_mistakes: Mismatch between described and actual I/O.

function: Justify the choice of a specific parameter value.
template: Значение параметра ___ было выбрано исходя из ___ .
when_to_use: To provide rationale for design or algorithmic choices.

function: Provide a high-level overview of the proposed method or system.
template: Предлагаемая система включает следующие этапы: ___ .
when_to_use: To give a bird's-eye view of the method before diving into details.
common_mistakes: Too much detail in the overview.

function: State the key assumptions made in the theoretical model.
template: В основу теоретической модели положено предположение о ___ .
when_to_use: In the methodology section to define the theoretical framework.

function: Define the operating limits or constraints of the model.
template: Модель применима в пределах ___ .
when_to_use: To clarify the scope of the theoretical analysis.

template: Обозначим через ___ .
when_to_use: To define new symbols used in equations.

function: Explain simplifications made in the model.
template: Для упрощения расчётов было принято ___ .
when_to_use: To justify why certain complexities were omitted.
common_mistakes: Simplifications that invalidate the model's purpose.

function: Acknowledge uncertainties or error sources in the model.
template: Основным источником погрешности является ___ .
when_to_use: To discuss potential inaccuracies in the model or measurements.

function: Compare two or more methods or concepts.
template: В отличие от ___ , предлагаемый подход ___ .
when_to_use: To highlight the advantages of the proposed method.
common_mistakes: Making unfair comparisons by ignoring context.

function: Identify a research gap in the literature.
template: Вместе с тем, ___ остается недостаточно изученным.
when_to_use: To justify the novelty of the research.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap that is actually well-addressed.

function: Describe the drawbacks of previous approaches.
template: Недостатком данного метода является ___ .
when_to_use: To argue for the necessity of the proposed approach.
common_mistakes: Listing limitations without linking them to the current research gap.

function: Position the current work relative to existing research.
template: Предлагаемая работа развивает направление ___ , предложенное ___ .
when_to_use: To show how the thesis fits into the broader field.
common_mistakes: Overstating the connection to unrelated prior work.

function: Introduce a classification of existing methods.
template: Существующие методы ___ можно классифицировать по ___ .
when_to_use: To structure a literature review.

template: This thesis has addressed the problem of ___ by developing ___ and proposing ___.
when_to_use: 在结论章节开头，简洁回顾全文工作。
common_mistakes: 重复摘要内容，未基于正文结果进行提炼。

function: 解释实验结果背后的内在机制
template: The performance gain can be attributed to the effective ___ of the search process on the ___.
when_to_use: 在讨论部分，不仅描述‘是什么’，更解释‘为什么’。
common_mistakes: 解释停留在表面，未深入算法原理或硬件特性。

function: 分析方法中的权衡关系
template: There exists a trade-off between ___ and ___; increasing the ___ improves exploration but may increase ___.
when_to_use: 讨论设计选择或参数调整带来的利弊。
common_mistakes: 只强调优点，回避或忽视潜在的缺点。

function: 描述实验所用的数据集或问题实例
template: The experiments are conducted on a benchmark suite consisting of ___ well-known ___ functions.
when_to_use: 在实验设置部分，说明测试数据的来源和特征。
common_mistakes: 数据描述不完整，未说明选择理由或预处理。

function: 定义评估算法性能的指标
template: Algorithm performance is evaluated using two metrics: ___ (average value found) and ___ (best value found).
when_to_use: 在实验设置部分，明确评估标准。
common_mistakes: 指标选择不当，或未说明指标计算方法。

function: 预览论文的主要理论或方法贡献
template: The main contributions of this work are the proposed ___ model and the ___ coordination method.
when_to_use: 在引言末尾，向读者快速展示工作的核心价值。
common_mistakes: 贡献陈述不具体，或与论文实际内容不匹配。

function: 声明论文的主要研究目标
template: This thesis aims to develop methods and models for the ___ of ___ with ___ architecture.
when_to_use: 在引言末尾或专门陈述目标的段落开头。
common_mistakes: 目标与问题陈述区分不清，或过于技术化难以理解。

function: 陈述研究要解决的核心问题
template: The central problem addressed is the ___ of metaheuristic algorithms with the ___ architecture.
when_to_use: 在引言或摘要中，清晰界定研究问题的核心对象与挑战。
common_mistakes: 问题描述过于宽泛，未限定具体对象与背景。

function: 列出为实现目标所需完成的具体研究任务
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are addressed: 1) to develop ___ for GPU; 2) to create a ___ model for algorithms; 3) to design ___ methods.
when_to_use: 在引言中，将大目标分解为具体、可验证的子任务。
common_mistakes: 任务描述过于模糊，或与后续章节内容脱节。

template: The thesis is structured as follows: Chapter ___ presents the problem statement and a literature survey. Chapter ___ details the development of models. Chapter ___ describes the coordination methods.
when_to_use: 在引言的最后一段，引导读者阅读。
common_mistakes: 结构描述与实际章节标题或内容不一致。

function: 详细描述算法的各个步骤
template: Step 1: Generate an initial population of ___. Step 2: Evaluate each solution using the ___ function.
when_to_use: 详细阐述自提出算法或优化流程的具体操作。
common_mistakes: 步骤描述不精确，缺乏可复现的细节。

function: 说明算法实现的关键细节
template: The algorithm is implemented on the GPU using the ___, where each thread block handles a subset of ___.
when_to_use: 在方法或实验章节，解释如何将理论方法转化为可执行代码。
common_mistakes: 实现细节过于底层，淹没了算法核心思想。

template: The proposed coordination method follows a pipeline: 1) ___, 2) ___, 3) ___.
when_to_use: 在方法章节开头，提供一个宏观的技术路线图。
common_mistakes: 流程描述不清，步骤之间逻辑关系不明。

template: The model assumes that the ___ of the GPU can be represented as a ___.
when_to_use: 在介绍数学模型之初，明确模型的简化前提。
common_mistakes: 假设不合理或过于理想化，导致模型脱离实际。

template: The model assumes that the ___ of the GPU can be represented as a ___.
when_to_use: 在介绍数学模型之初，明确模型的简化前提。
common_mistakes: 假设不合理或过于理想化，导致模型脱离实际。

template: The proposed model is applicable to GPU architectures with a ___.
when_to_use: 在模型描述部分，限定其应用条件。
common_mistakes: 适用范围描述过于宽泛，导致模型可信度下降。

function: 引入并解释关键数学符号
template: Let ___ denote the set of ___ in the GPU architecture.
when_to_use: 在模型公式推导前，统一定义所有符号。
common_mistakes: 符号定义不清晰或与通用惯例冲突。

function: 解释对复杂系统的简化处理
template: For tractability, the model simplifies the ___ by considering only ___.
when_to_use: 当模型忽略某些复杂因素时，需向读者说明。
common_mistakes: 简化处理未加说明，可能被视为模型缺陷。

function: 用表格形式对比不同方法的结果
template: Table X compares the performance of the proposed algorithm with ___ on the ___.
when_to_use: 当需要比较多个方法在多个问题上的表现时。
common_mistakes: 表格信息过载，重点不突出；或未对最佳结果进行高亮。

template: The proposed method achieved a ___ improvement in ___ over the baseline, reducing the average error from X to Y.
when_to_use: 在结果部分，用具体数字展示性能提升。
common_mistakes: 仅报告平均值，未提供方差或统计显著性检验。

function: 对不同算法或方法进行比较
template: Unlike evolutionary algorithms, behavioral algorithms typically ___ by ___.
when_to_use: 在综述中对比不同类别技术的特征差异。
common_mistakes: 比较流于表面，未深入分析本质差异。
slots: operate based on swarm intelligence principles

template: This highlights the need for a systematic approach to the ___ of algorithms with ___.
when_to_use: 基于文献分析，明确指出研究机会。
common_mistakes: 研究空白界定不清，与现有工作区分度不够。

function: 指出现有研究的不足之处
template: A key limitation of prior approaches is the lack of a formal model for the ___ between algorithm and ___.
when_to_use: 在综述末尾，引出自己研究的必要性。

function: 对现有方法进行分类介绍
template: Methods for ___ can be classified into ___ and ___ categories.
when_to_use: 在文献综述中，对某一技术领域的方法进行系统分类。

template: The main contributions of this work include: (a) ___ ; (b) ___ ; (c) ___ .

template: The objective of this work is to develop ___ for ___ that ensures ___ .

template: The problem of ___ arises when ___ must estimate ___ under conditions of ___ .

common_mistakes: Conflating the problem with the solution

function: List research tasks that decompose the objective
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are addressed: (1) ___ ; (2) ___ ; (3) ___ ; (4) ___ .

template: Chapter ___ is devoted to ___ ; Chapter ___ presents ___ ; Chapter ___ describes ___ .

when_to_use: When detailing a specific algorithm

template: The implementation uses ___ to process ___ , with ___ handling the ___ stage.
when_to_use: When discussing practical software/hardware implementation

template: The algorithm takes ___ as input and produces ___ as output, with ___ as an intermediate result.

function: Explain how a method parameter is chosen
template: The parameter ___ is set to ___ based on ___ , with a recommended range of [___, ___] .

template: The proposed method consists of the following stages: ___ , ___ , and ___ , where the output of ___ feeds into ___ .

function: Make a conservative claim about method stability
template: Under the condition that ___ remains within ___ , the method is expected to produce ___ results.

template: The model is valid under the boundary conditions: ___ ∈ [___, ___] and ___ ∈ [___, ___] .

function: Describe a constraint on the model

function: Introduce notation for a key variable

function: Discuss which parameters can be identified from data

function: Define axes for evaluating prior methods

common_mistakes: Axes not relevant to the problem

template: Thus, there is a gap in methods that can ___ while maintaining ___ for ___ .
when_to_use: End of literature review section
common_mistakes: Gap already addressed in cited work

function: Identify a limitation in prior work
template: A limitation of ___ is that it does not account for ___ , which is critical for ___ .
when_to_use: When concluding discussion of a specific prior approach

function: Position the proposed method relative to existing ones
template: The proposed method differs from ___ in that it combines ___ with ___ to achieve ___ .
when_to_use: After the gap is identified

template: Existing methods for ___ can be classified into the following groups: ___ -based approaches, ___ -based approaches, and ___ -based approaches.

function: Preview main contributions of the dissertation
template: The main scientific contributions are: (1) a formalized model of ___, (2) a ___ method for ___, (3) an ___ model validated through ___.
when_to_use: Brief contributions list in introduction before detailed chapters
common_mistakes: Claiming contributions without distinguishing from prior work

function: State research objective using formal dissertation language
template: The aim of the present research is to develop ___ for ___ that ensure ___ of ___ processes.
when_to_use: Formal objective statement in the introduction
common_mistakes: Objective too broad or not matching the title

function: Enumerate specific manifestations of the problem in practice
template: In practice, this is expressed in non-compliance with ___, requirements for ___ and ___, and as a result, ___ are not met, reducing the efficiency of ___.
when_to_use: Converting abstract problems into observable symptoms
common_mistakes: Staying too abstract without concrete operational consequences

function: Identify unique challenges of field-level operations
template: However, ___ at ___ have their own features, caused by a deficit of ___, absence of ___, which ultimately leads to the problem of reduced ___ of ___.
when_to_use: Explaining why standard solutions fail in a specific context
common_mistakes: Treating field conditions as identical to laboratory/factory conditions

function: State modern trends driving the research topic
template: Modern trends in ___ manifest in increasing complexity of ___ and ___ of ___, leading to growth of potentially possible ___ and ___ in ___.
when_to_use: Opening paragraphs justifying why a topic matters now

Listing trends without linking to the problem

function: Highlight enabling technologies that make the research possible
template: Thanks to the development of ___ and ___, as well as ___ for processing ___, it became possible to transition to ___.
when_to_use: Motivation section where enabling technology justifies feasibility
common_mistakes: Overclaiming novelty without citing enabling advances

function: Describe paradigm shift from scheduled to condition-based approach
template: The transition to ___ based on actual ___ allows ___ to be performed in the volume required by fact, rather than according to ___ data.
when_to_use: When explaining a shift from static to adaptive methodology
common_mistakes: Not explaining what was wrong with the old paradigm

function: Present two-sided assessment of an approach
template: On the one hand, this approach provided ___ of ___ on ___. On the other hand, it allowed clearly seeing the problem of ___ of ___.
when_to_use: Balanced evaluation paragraph showing benefits and revealed gaps
common_mistakes: Presenting only positive side without the tradeoff

function: Specify the most affected domain with justification
template: The problem is most relevant for ___ whose operation implies performing ___ directly at the ___ due to the impossibility of ___ and economic infeasibility caused by ___.
when_to_use: Narrowing scope from general to specific application domain
common_mistakes: Failing to justify why this particular domain is hardest hit

template: To achieve the stated aim, the following tasks are solved: (1) analysis of ___, (2) formalization and modeling of ___, (3) development of ___ model, (4) experimental verification of ___.
when_to_use: Structured task list mapping to dissertation chapters
common_mistakes: Tasks that don't correspond to chapter structure
Tasks too granular or too vague

function: Describe the structure of the dissertation
template: The dissertation consists of an introduction, ___ chapters, conclusions, a list of references, and ___ appendices.
when_to_use: Structural overview paragraph near end of introduction
common_mistakes: Over-detailed description of each section content

function: Describe step-by-step algorithm for decision support
template: Step 1: Collect ___ and ___. Step 2: Update ___ based on ___. Step 3: Compute ___ and select ___.
when_to_use: Algorithmic description section
common_mistakes: Steps that are too abstract for implementation

function: Specify inputs and outputs of the simulation model
template: The simulation model takes as input ___ and ___, and produces as output ___ and ___.
when_to_use: Interface description of the proposed tool
common_mistakes: Inputs that are unavailable in practice
Outputs that don't address the stated problem

function: Describe how key parameters are set or tuned
template: The parameter ___ is set based on ___, with the recommended value of ___ obtained from ___.
when_to_use: Configuration section of the method

template: The proposed methodology consists of the following stages: (1) ___, (2) ___, (3) ___, with feedback from ___ to ___.
when_to_use: Overview section of the method chapter

function: State simplifying assumptions of the model
template: The following assumptions are adopted: (1) ___ follows a known distribution, (2) ___ is constant during ___, (3) ___ are independent of ___.
when_to_use: Model section before derivation or simulation setup
common_mistakes: Assumptions that are unrealistic or unstated
Too many assumptions making model inapplicable

function: Define scope and boundary conditions of the model
template: The model considers ___ within the boundaries defined by ___, where ___ is limited to ___ and excludes ___.
when_to_use: Defining what the model does and does not cover
common_mistakes: Boundaries too narrow to be practical

function: Formulate constraints of the optimization model
template: The optimization is subject to constraints on ___, ___, and ___, ensuring that ___ does not exceed ___.
when_to_use: Defining the feasible region for optimization
common_mistakes: Constraints that are too tight making solution infeasible

function: Introduce formalization of a business process
template: The formalization of the ___ process involves defining the set of ___ and ___ that govern transitions between ___.
when_to_use: Chapter presenting formal process model

template: Let ___ denote the ___ of ___, and let ___ represent the ___ at time ___.

slots: state variables of its real-world prototype

function: Identify sources of uncertainty in the model
template: The main sources of uncertainty in the model are: (1) ___, which leads to unpredictable ___, (2) ___, causing variability in ___.

common_mistakes: Ignoring uncertainty sources that are later dominant

when_to_use: Systematic comparison table or paragraph in survey

function: Identify the research gap between current state and needs

template: Existing approaches to ___ suffer from ___, which manifest as ___, limiting their applicability to ___.

function: Position the proposed work relative to existing literature
template: Unlike existing works that focus on ___, the proposed approach addresses ___ by incorporating ___.

common_mistakes: Overstating novelty without proper literature coverage

template: Decision support methods for ___ can be classified into the following groups: ___-based, ___-based, and ___-based approaches.

template: В результате проведённых исследований установлено, что ___ обеспечивает ___ при содержании ___.

function: State practical motivation for the research
template: В условиях интенсивной эксплуатации деталей ___ наблюдается их ускоренный износ и коррозионное разрушение.

when_to_use: When classifying materials by base element

function: Summarize the key contributions of the work.
template: The main contributions of this dissertation are: 1) the development of a method for ___; 2) a comprehensive study of ___.
slots: automated assessment of facial phenotypic features from 2D images
the informative value of these features for disease recognition
when_to_use: In the conclusion to concisely restate the value added by the research.
common_mistakes: Simply repeating the abstract or introduction without synthesis.

template: Future work will focus on validating the system on larger and more diverse datasets and integrating it with ___.
when_to_use: To close the dissertation by pointing towards subsequent research.
common_mistakes: Proposing vague or unrelated future studies.

function: Interpret and explain the underlying reasons for the observed results.
template: The superior performance likely stems from the model's ability to learn complex ___ that are not captured by ___.
when_to_use: To provide deeper insight beyond just reporting numbers.

function: Acknowledge limitations that could affect the validity of the conclusions.
template: A limitation of this study is the ___ of the dataset, which may affect the model's generalization to ___.

template: Classification performance was assessed using ___ and ___.
when_to_use: To formalize how success is measured.

function: Introduce a mathematical symbol or notation.
template: Let *F* denote the set of extracted phenotypic features for a given image.
when_to_use: When formally defining a key variable in a mathematical or technical description.
common_mistakes: Using ambiguous or conflicting symbols for different variables.

function: State the main goal of the dissertation.
template: The primary objective of this work is to develop a biotechnical system for ___ congenital morphogenetic facial variants.
when_to_use: In the introduction or abstract to declare the research aim.
common_mistakes: Using overly broad verbs like 'study' instead of specific ones like 'develop a system for recognizing'.

function: State the core problem that motivates the research.
template: An important clinical challenge is the automated analysis of ___ from 2D facial images.
when_to_use: In the introduction to define the research gap and problem.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the specific challenge (e.g., 'analyze faces').

function: Outline the structure of the dissertation.
template: The thesis is structured as follows: Chapter 1 presents ___; Chapter 2 details the development of the automated method.
slots: a survey of clinical practice and existing approaches
when_to_use: At the end of the introduction to guide the reader.
common_mistakes: Listing chapter titles without explaining their logical flow or content.

function: Describe how key parameters were chosen or set.
template: The optimal number of layers and neurons in the neural network was determined through ___.
when_to_use: When explaining model configuration decisions.
common_mistakes: Not justifying parameter choices with references or preliminary experiments.

function: Provide a high-level description of the methodological pipeline.
template: The proposed method comprises three main stages: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the methodology chapter to summarize the workflow.
common_mistakes: Describing steps in excessive detail here; save details for subsections.

function: State fundamental assumptions of the proposed model or method.
template: This work assumes that informative phenotypic features can be reliably extracted from ___ with sufficient accuracy.

common_mistakes: Stating trivial assumptions or omitting critical ones that affect validity.

function: Report the improvement over a baseline.
template: Compared to the baseline method using ___, the proposed approach improved accuracy by ___ percentage points.
when_to_use: When highlighting the advantage of your method over previous work.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the exact baseline method for a fair comparison.

template: The proposed system achieved a recognition accuracy of ___ on the test set.
when_to_use: To present the main quantitative findings of experiments.
common_mistakes: Reporting numbers without context (e.g., confidence intervals, comparison to baseline).

function: Compare different existing approaches or schemes.
template: Two primary diagnostic paradigms are distinguished: ___ and ___.
when_to_use: In a literature review to categorize and contrast methods.
common_mistakes: Presenting a list without highlighting key differences and similarities.

function: Point out the shortcomings of previous works.
template: Existing classification systems for genetic diseases by facial appearance often rely on ___ and lack ___.
when_to_use: To justify the need for a new automated method.
common_mistakes: Not linking the limitation directly to the problem your work solves.

function: Smoothly begin a new section or chapter.
template: Having reviewed the clinical background, this chapter now turns to the ___ of the automated method.
when_to_use: To create a logical flow between chapters or major sections.
common_mistakes: Abruptly starting a new topic without a transitional phrase.

function: Outlining potential directions for subsequent research.
template: Перспективными направлениями дальнейших исследований являются ___ .
slots: экспериментальная отработка полноразмерного макета НТУ на орбите
when_to_use: To show that the research opens new avenues and is not an endpoint.
common_mistakes: Suggesting future work that is trivially obvious or disconnected from the current findings.
Being too vague (e.g., 'more research is needed').

function: Recapitulating the main findings and achievements of the work.
template: В результате выполненной работы ___ .
slots: получены зависимости, позволяющие оценить эффективность НТУ
when_to_use: At the beginning of the concluding chapter to reiterate the core outcomes.
common_mistakes: Simply repeating the abstract or introduction verbatim.
Introducing new information or claims not previously discussed.

function: Providing a physical or logical explanation for an observed result or phenomenon.
template: Наблюдаемый эффект ___ объясняется ___ .
slots: длительным нахождением оболочки в зоне прямой солнечной радиации
when_to_use: To go beyond reporting 'what' happened to explaining 'why' or 'how' it happened.
common_mistakes: Offering speculative explanations without evidence from the data or literature.

function: Analyzing the balance or compromise between conflicting factors or objectives.
template: Выбор параметров представляет собой компромисс между ___ и ___ .
when_to_use: In the discussion of design choices or optimization results.
common_mistakes: Presenting the trade-off as a simple choice without quantitative analysis.
Not concluding on which factor is prioritized and why.

function: Describing the source, nature, and characteristics of the data used.
template: В качестве исходных данных для моделирования использовались ___ .
slots: параметры атмосферы из модели NRLMSISE-00 и солнечной активности
when_to_use: Before presenting results to establish the foundation of the analysis.
common_mistakes: Assuming the reader is familiar with standard data sources.
Not specifying the version, year, or resolution of the datasets.

function: Defining the specific test cases, scenarios, or conditions for investigation.
template: Рассматривались два варианта орбит: ___ и ___ .
when_to_use: To detail the scope of the experimental or parametric study.
common_mistakes: Using an unrealistic number of scenarios that make the study unmanageable.
Choosing scenarios that are not representative of the problem space.

function: Declaring the main goal or purpose of the dissertation.
template: Целью настоящей работы является исследование ___ .
slots: параметров и условий функционирования надувного тормозного устройства (НТУ)
when_to_use: Directly after the problem statement to state what the research aims to achieve.
common_mistakes: Confusing the objective with tasks or methods.
Using vague verbs like 'study' without specifying the expected outcome (e.g., optimization, verification, analysis).

function: Formulating the core issue or challenge that the research addresses.
template: Особенно остро проблема стоит в отношении ___, которые ___ .
when_to_use: To narrow down from a general relevance statement to a specific, acute case of the problem.
common_mistakes: Making the problem too vague or too narrow.
Not specifying the actors or objects involved in the problem.

function: Stating the practical importance or timeliness of the research topic.
template: В настоящее время проблема ___ вышла в число приоритетных.
slots: очистки околоземного космического пространства от космического мусора
when_to_use: At the beginning of the introduction to establish why the thesis topic matters now.
common_mistakes: Using overly broad statements that lack specificity to the field.
Failing to connect the problem to current trends or events.

function: Listing the specific research tasks undertaken to achieve the objective.
template: Для достижения поставленной цели решались следующие задачи: 1. ___; 2. ___; 3. ___.
when_to_use: To provide a clear roadmap of the thesis structure after stating the main objective.
common_mistakes: Listing tasks that are too procedural rather than substantive research steps.

function: Justifying the choice of key parameters or settings for an experiment or simulation.
template: Параметры ___ выбраны на основании ___ .
slots: анализа типичных орбитальных условий и конструктивных ограничений
when_to_use: When describing experimental or simulation details to show that choices are reasoned, not arbitrary.
common_mistakes: Citing values from literature without explaining their applicability to your specific case.
