when_to_use: При представлении количественных результатов

function: Обоснование выбора базовых методов для сравнения
template: В качестве базовых методов для сравнения выбраны ___ в силу их ___
when_to_use: При обосновании выбора baseline в обзоре

template: Метод ___ обеспечивает точность ___ на наборе данных ___, что превосходит ___
when_to_use: При сравнительном анализе в обзоре

template: Вместе с тем, в существующих работах недостаточно внимания уделяется ___
when_to_use: В конце обзора для обоснования собственного подхода
common_mistakes: Формулировка пробела, который уже закрыт в литературе

function: Ограничения существующих подходов к извлечению признаков
template: Недостатком подхода на основе ___ является ___ при ___
when_to_use: При критическом анализе существующих методов

template: В зависимости от ___ можно выделить следующие типы окклюзий: ___
when_to_use: В обзоре при систематизации типов окклюзий
common_mistakes: Отсутствие визуальных примеров для каждого типа

template: Основные научные результаты: 1) ___ ; 2) ___ ; 3) ___ .
when_to_use: Conclusion section

template: Ограничения работы: ___ , ___ .
when_to_use: End of conclusion section
common_mistakes: Omitting limitations that reviewers will identify

template: В результате проведённого исследования установлено, что ___ .
when_to_use: Conclusion section opening

function: Discuss generalizability to other crane types
template: Предложенный подход может быть распространён на ___ при условии ___ .
when_to_use: Generalization discussion

function: Explain physical mechanism behind observed results
template: Улучшение ___ объясняется тем, что алгоритм учитывает ___ , что ранее не принималось во внимание.
when_to_use: Discussion of results section

template: Результаты алгоритма чувствительны к ___ : изменение на ___ % приводит к ___ .
when_to_use: Sensitivity analysis discussion
common_mistakes: Sensitivity range too narrow to be informative

template: Выбор промежуточного порога представляет компромисс между ___ и ___ .
when_to_use: Discussion of parameter selection

template: Экспериментальные данные получены на установке, включающей ___ , ___ и ___ .
when_to_use: Experimental setup description

template: Условия эксперимента воспроизводимы при соблюдении ___ и ___ .
when_to_use: Methods section of experiments

function: Design experimental scenarios for crane operation
template: Экспериментальные сценарии включают режимы: ___ , ___ и ___ с грузом массой ___ .
when_to_use: Experimental design section

template: Основными результатами работы являются: ___ , ___ , ___ .
when_to_use: End of introduction or abstract
common_mistakes: Contributions not distinguishing from prior work

template: Целью работы является повышение безопасности ___ путём алгоритмической обработки информации о ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction section, after problem statement

function: State the core safety problem in crane operation
template: Повышение безопасности работы ___ на основе ___ является актуальной задачей.
when_to_use: Opening of dissertation or introduction section to define scope

function: List research tasks derived from the objective
template: Для достижения поставленной цели решены следующие задачи: ___ .
when_to_use: Introduction after stating the objective

function: Describe the structure of the dissertation
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: End of introduction section

function: Plan for testing individual algorithm components
template: Для оценки влияния ___ на качество работы ограничителя проведены эксперименты с ___ .
when_to_use: Experimental methodology section

function: Describe algorithm steps for load limiter
template: Алгоритм ограничителя грузоподъемности включает следующие этапы: 1) ___ ; 2) ___ ; 3) ___ .
when_to_use: Chapter on algorithmic processing
common_mistakes: Steps not ordered by execution sequence

function: Describe implementation specifics for different control systems
template: Для кранов с ___ системой управления алгоритм реализуется путём ___ .
when_to_use: Section comparing relay-contactor vs frequency control
common_mistakes: Not distinguishing implementation per control type

template: Входными данными алгоритма являются ___ ; выходными — ___ .
when_to_use: Algorithm description section
common_mistakes: Inputs not accessible from available sensors

function: Describe parameter setting method for the algorithm
template: Параметры алгоритма ограничителя определяются с промежуточным порогом на основе ___ .
when_to_use: Method section on algorithm tuning

function: State assumptions of the dynamic model
template: При построении динамической модели приняты следующие допущения: ___ .
when_to_use: Chapter on dynamic process description

function: Define boundary conditions for crane cycle analysis
template: Граничные условия обобщённого цикла работы крана: ___ при t=0 и ___ при t=T.
when_to_use: Dynamic model section describing crane cycle

template: Ограничения модели: жёсткость металлоконструкции ___ , жёсткость канатного подвеса ___ .
when_to_use: Model parameterization section

function: Discuss parameter identification for dynamic model
template: Параметры динамической модели (___ , ___ , ___ ) определяются на основе экспериментальных данных.
when_to_use: Section on parameter determination
common_mistakes: Not discussing sensitivity to parameter errors

function: Describe simplifications made in the model
template: Для упрощения расчёта ___ пренебрегаем влиянием ___ .
when_to_use: Model derivation section

function: Present comparison of methods in tabular form
template: В таблице ___ представлено сравнение ___ по показателям ___ .
when_to_use: Results section with tabular data

function: Report distribution characteristics of measured data
template: Распределение ___ характеризуется средним значением ___ и стандартным отклонением ___ .
when_to_use: Statistical analysis of experimental data

function: Report improvement of proposed method over baseline
template: Предложенный алгоритм обеспечивает снижение ___ на ___ % по сравнению с серийным ограничителем.
when_to_use: Results comparison section

template: Значение ___ составило ___ при ___ , что на ___ % отличается от расчётного.
when_to_use: Results section of experiments

template: Методики расчёта ___ различаются по учёту ___ : ___ .
when_to_use: Survey of calculation methods

template: В литературе отсутствует комплексный подход к ___ с учётом ___ .
when_to_use: End of literature review to motivate own work
common_mistakes: Gap statement too vague to validate

function: Identify limitations of existing safety devices
template: Существующие ограничители грузоподъемности не учитывают ___ , что приводит к ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review section on safety devices

function: Classify types of safety devices for cranes
template: Средства безопасности кранов подразделяются на ___ : регистраторы параметров, ограничители ___ , и ___ .
when_to_use: Literature review overview of safety devices

function: To reiterate the key scholarly or practical contributions of the work.
template: The main contribution of this dissertation is the developed methodology that enables ___.
slots: strategic planning of industrial diversification based on quantitative modeling
when_to_use: In the conclusion to summarize the novelty and value of the completed work.
common_mistakes: Being too modest or too boastful about the contributions.

function: To suggest directions for subsequent research.
template: Future research should focus on extending the model to incorporate ___ and testing it in ___.
when_to_use: To provide a forward-looking perspective and acknowledge the study's boundaries.
common_mistakes: Suggesting trivial or impossible future work.
Presenting future work that merely repeats the current study's limitations.

function: To explain the 'why' behind an observed result or phenomenon.
template: The observed correlation between ___ and ___ can be attributed to the mechanism of ___.
when_to_use: To go beyond describing what happened to explaining why it happened, based on the research framework.
common_mistakes: Offering explanations that are not supported by the data or model.
Confusing correlation with causation without justification.

function: To characterize the dataset used for testing or application.
template: The empirical analysis is based on financial and operational data from ___ industrial enterprises.
when_to_use: To describe the source, scope, and nature of the data used in the research.
common_mistakes: Providing insufficient detail on data sources and time period.
Not discussing data quality or preprocessing steps.

function: To define the criteria or measures used to evaluate performance.
template: Effectiveness of the diversification strategy is measured using ___ and ___.
when_to_use: To specify what 'success' or 'performance' means in the context of the research.
common_mistakes: Using too many metrics without clear prioritization.
Choosing metrics that are not directly aligned with the research objectives.

function: To state the primary aim of the research.
template: The primary objective of this work is to develop a methodology for ___.
when_to_use: To concisely declare what the dissertation seeks to achieve.
common_mistakes: Using vague verbs like 'to study' or 'to analyze' instead of precise verbs like 'to develop', 'to propose', 'to evaluate'.

function: To articulate the core research problem or gap.
template: A critical issue in the context of ___ is the lack of a comprehensive methodology for ___.
when_to_use: To state the central problem that the thesis aims to solve.
common_mistakes: Stating a problem that is too broad or not solvable by the research.
Mistaking a symptom for the core problem.

function: To frame the research topic within a broader context of challenges.
template: The study of ___ is driven by the pressing need to address the challenges of ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of an introduction to establish the practical urgency of the research topic.
common_mistakes: Using overly generic challenges not specific to the research problem.
Failing to link the challenge directly to the studied phenomenon.

function: To discuss the computational or operational complexity of a method.
template: While the simulation approach is flexible, its computational complexity increases with ___.
slots: the number of modeled market scenarios
when_to_use: To honestly address the limitations and resource requirements of the proposed approach.
common_mistakes: Overstating the simplicity of a complex method.

function: To provide a high-level summary of the proposed method's stages.
template: The methodology comprises four sequential stages: 1) ___, 2) ___, 3) ___, and 4) ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the methodology chapter to give the reader a roadmap.
common_mistakes: Listing stages in a non-logical order.
Being too vague about what each stage entails.

function: To declare the foundational assumptions of the proposed model or framework.
template: The proposed model operates under the key assumption that ___ can be quantified by ___.
when_to_use: In the methodology chapter to set boundaries and ensure transparency about the model's starting points.
common_mistakes: Stating assumptions that are unrealistic or not adhered to in the model.

function: To discuss how model parameters are determined or estimated.
template: The parameter ___ within the profit model is identified based on ___ from historical data.
when_to_use: When explaining how abstract model components are connected to real-world data.
common_mistakes: Using parameters that cannot be observed or estimated in practice.
Failing to justify the chosen method for parameter identification.

function: To systematically compare different options or scenarios.
template: A comparative analysis of diversification paths A and B reveals that Path A is superior in terms of ___, while Path B excels in ___.
when_to_use: To present structured comparisons that support decision-making or conclusions.
common_mistakes: Failing to highlight the key differentiating factors.

function: To present quantitative findings from experiments or analysis.
template: The modeling results indicate that implementing the proposed strategy could lead to a ___ % increase in ___.
when_to_use: To convey specific numerical outcomes clearly and objectively.
common_mistakes: Reporting results without sufficient context (e.g., baseline).

function: To explicitly state the gap the thesis intends to fill.
template: This reveals a gap in the literature concerning the integration of ___ with ___.
when_to_use: After reviewing limitations to pinpoint the specific missing piece your research addresses.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap that is not supported by the preceding literature review.
Stating a gap that is too broad to be addressed in a single thesis.

function: To critique or identify shortcomings in existing studies or methods.
template: Existing models for ___ often overlook the critical factor of ___, limiting their applicability.
when_to_use: To justify the need for new research by highlighting gaps or weaknesses in the current state of the art.
common_mistakes: Being unfairly dismissive of prior work without evidence.

function: To classify prior works or approaches into defined groups.
template: Prior research on ___ can be systematically categorized into three main approaches: ___, ___, and ___.
when_to_use: When reviewing the literature to organize existing knowledge and identify patterns.
common_mistakes: Creating an arbitrary or overlapping classification.
Not defining the basis (criteria) for the classification.

function: To logically introduce a new chapter or major section.
template: Having established the theoretical foundations, the following chapter addresses the ___ aspects of ___.
when_to_use: At the start of a new chapter to connect it to the preceding content and preview its focus.
common_mistakes: Abruptly starting a new section without linking it to the previous one.
Using a generic opener that could apply to any section.

template: Увеличение ___ приводит к ___ вследствие ___

template: Наибольшее влияние на ___ оказывает параметр ___

template: Увеличение ___ обеспечивает рост ___, однако приводит к снижению ___
when_to_use: Discussing optimization tradeoffs

template: Экспериментальные исследования проводились на стенде, состоящем из ___
when_to_use: Experimental methodology section

template: Параметры математической модели: турбулентная модель — ___
when_to_use: Reporting simulation settings

template: В качестве критерия эффективности используется ___
when_to_use: Defining performance indicators

template: Каждое измерение повторялось ___ раз, среднее значение составило ___
when_to_use: Statistical reliability reporting

template: Испытания проводились при следующих условиях: ___
when_to_use: Defining experimental matrix

template: Основными результатами работы являются: ___
when_to_use: End of introduction to summarize novelty

function: State the practical importance of the research problem
template: Повышение эффективности ___ является актуальной задачей для ___
when_to_use: Opening of introduction to justify research relevance
common_mistakes: Too broad motivation without specific industry context

template: Целью работы является разработка методики ___ для ___
when_to_use: End of introduction problem formulation
common_mistakes: Objective too narrow or too broad

template: Существующие методики проектирования ___ не учитывают влияние ___ на ___
when_to_use: Problem statement section to identify gaps

template: Для достижения поставленной цели решаются следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: After objective statement to structure the work
common_mistakes: Tasks too granular or too general

template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы
when_to_use: End of introduction for structural overview

template: Для оценки влияния ___ проводится сравнение ___
when_to_use: Justifying component importance through controlled experiments

template: На первом этапе выполняется ___; на втором этапе ___
when_to_use: Detailed methodology description

template: Реализация ___ выполнена с использованием ___
when_to_use: Describing practical implementation

template: Входными данными являются: ___; результатом является: ___
when_to_use: Interface description of proposed method

template: Значение параметра ___ выбрано равным ___ на основании ___
when_to_use: Reporting key parameter choices

template: Методика включает следующие этапы: ___
when_to_use: Overview of proposed methodology

template: При построении математической модели приняты следующие допущения: ___
when_to_use: Beginning of mathematical model description

template: Граничные условия на входе: ___; на выходе: ___
when_to_use: CFD simulation setup description

template: Ограничениями на параметры являются: ___
when_to_use: Optimization problem formulation

template: Обозначим через ___ величину, характеризующую ___
when_to_use: First appearance of key variables

template: Параметр ___ определяется на основе экспериментальных данных по ___
when_to_use: Describing model calibration

template: Для упрощения расчетов предполагается, что ___
when_to_use: When justifying reduced-complexity models

template: На рисунке ___ представлены результаты для случая ___
when_to_use: Analyzing specific operating points

template: В таблице ___ приведены результаты сравнения ___
when_to_use: Introducing comparison tables

template: При ___ наблюдается существенное снижение ___
when_to_use: Identifying operational limits

template: Оптимизация позволила повысить ___ на ___% по сравнению с ___
when_to_use: Quantifying optimization benefits

template: Значение ___ составляет ___ при ___
when_to_use: Reporting key findings

template: В качестве базового метода выбрана методика ___ ввиду ___
when_to_use: Selecting reference methods for comparison

template: Методика ___ позволяет рассчитать ___ с погрешностью не более ___
when_to_use: Comparative review of calculation methods

template: В литературе отсутствуют данные по ___ при ___
when_to_use: Transition from literature review to research justification
common_mistakes: Gap too narrow to be significant
Gap already addressed in recent work

template: Недостатком существующих методик является отсутствие учета ___
when_to_use: Literature review to justify new approach

function: Interprets the physical or technical reason behind an observed result.
template: The observed deviation in ___ is attributed to the effect of ___ .
slots: the measured phenomenon or result (e.g., surge line shift)
the physical mechanism (e.g., inlet distortion, heat transfer)
when_to_use: To provide insight beyond mere data reporting.
common_mistakes: Proposing a mechanism that is not supported by the data.

function: Discusses how sensitive the results are to changes in a key factor.
template: The results are highly sensitive to the value of ___ , indicating the need for ___ .
slots: the sensitive parameter (e.g., tip clearance, inlet guide vane angle)
a consequent action (e.g., precise control, further investigation)
when_to_use: To identify critical parameters or potential sources of instability.
common_mistakes: Not linking sensitivity to practical implications.

function: Describes the experimental setup and data collection process.
template: Experimental data were collected using ___ with a sampling rate of ___ .
slots: the measurement system or instrument (e.g., pressure transducers, a data acquisition system)
when_to_use: In the methodology section of an experimental chapter.
common_mistakes: Omitting key specifications like sampling rate, sensor type, or location.

function: Defines the key performance indicators used for evaluation.
template: The primary performance metrics are ___ and ___ .
when_to_use: To set clear evaluation criteria for experiments and simulations.
common_mistakes: Using too many metrics that are not directly comparable.
Metrics are not standard or clearly defined in the field.

function: Provides information necessary for reproducing the experiment.
template: To ensure reproducibility, the inlet conditions were maintained at ___ with an uncertainty of ___ .
slots: the controlled condition (e.g., total pressure, temperature)
the achieved tolerance or uncertainty band
when_to_use: To add credibility and allow verification of experimental results.
common_mistakes: Failing to report critical control variables and their tolerances.
Omitting details of the control methodology.

function: Explains the rationale behind the design of test cases or scenarios.
template: The test scenarios are designed to cover the operational envelope from ___ to ___ .
slots: the lower bound of a parameter range (e.g., surge limit)
the upper bound (e.g., choke line, maximum speed)
when_to_use: To justify the choice of experimental test points.
common_mistakes: Scenarios are not representative of real-world or critical operating conditions.
The design rationale is not connected to the research objectives.

function: Details the sequential steps of a developed method or algorithm.
template: Step n: Calculate ___ based on the previous result of ___ .
slots: the value or parameter to calculate in this step
the value from the previous step
when_to_use: For presenting a novel computational method or a complex calculation procedure.
common_mistakes: Key equations or decision points within a step are omitted.

function: Describes practical aspects of implementing a theoretical method.
template: Practical implementation requires addressing ___ , such as ___ .
slots: a practical challenge (e.g., data acquisition, sensor placement)
when_to_use: When bridging the gap between theory and practical application.
common_mistakes: Overly vague about the practical hurdle.
The solution presented is not clearly linked to the challenge.

function: Clearly defines the inputs and outputs of a key procedure or calculation.
template: The input to the adaptation algorithm is ___ , and the output is ___ .
slots: the input parameter(s) (e.g., off-design inlet conditions)
the output result(s) (e.g., corrected performance map)
when_to_use: When describing a key computational or analytical procedure in detail.
common_mistakes: Ambiguity in what constitutes the input/output.
Mixing up variables with their physical meaning.

function: Justifies the choice of key parameters or constants in the method.
template: The parameter ___ is set to ___ based on ___ considerations.
slots: the justification (e.g., literature precedent, physical bounds)
when_to_use: To explain non-obvious choices in experimental setup or model calibration.
common_mistakes: Not discussing the sensitivity of results to this parameter.

function: Provides a high-level summary of a multi-step research methodology.
template: The proposed adaptation methodology comprises three main stages: ___ , ___ , and ___ .
when_to_use: At the beginning of a methodology chapter to orient the reader.
common_mistakes: Listing stages without indicating their sequence or dependency.
The overview is too detailed for an introduction.

function: States the fundamental assumptions underlying a model or method.
template: The model assumes that ___ remains constant and that ___ effects are negligible.
slots: a key parameter or condition (e.g., gas properties, flow steadiness)
a physical effect (e.g., viscous, heat transfer)
when_to_use: When introducing a new theoretical model or simplifying a complex physical problem.
common_mistakes: Burying assumptions in the text without explicit listing.
Assuming something that is clearly violated in the application scenario.

function: Defines the limits or constraints of the model's validity.
template: The validity of this model is bounded by ___ and ___ .
slots: an upper limit (e.g., maximum pressure ratio)
a lower limit (e.g., minimum Mach number)
when_to_use: To clarify the applicable range of a theoretical or computational model.
common_mistakes: Not specifying boundaries, leading to misuse.
Boundaries are not supported by theoretical or experimental evidence.

function: Describes deliberate simplifications made to make the problem tractable.
template: For analytical tractability, the complex geometry of ___ is simplified to ___ .
slots: the real-world complex object (e.g., blade row, flow channel)
the simplified representation (e.g., a cascade, a duct with variable area)
when_to_use: In theoretical derivations where a simplified analog is used.
common_mistakes: Simplifying away the physics central to the phenomenon.
Not assessing the impact of the simplification on the result.

function: Introduces a table that compares multiple methods or conditions.
template: Table n presents a comparative summary of ___ across different ___ .
slots: the results or metrics being compared
the conditions or methods being contrasted
when_to_use: To summarize complex multi-variable results in a structured format.
common_mistakes: The table is too wide or contains irrelevant data.
The key findings are not highlighted in the accompanying text.

function: Quantifies the improvement achieved by the proposed method over a baseline.
template: The proposed adaptation method reduces the prediction error by ___ % compared to the conventional method.
slots: the percentage of improvement or reduction
when_to_use: To highlight the added value of the new method.
common_mistakes: Not comparing against a relevant and strong baseline.
Using relative improvement without also reporting absolute values.

function: Reports specific numerical results from experiments or simulations.
template: At the design point, the measured efficiency was ___ , which is ___ compared to the predicted value.
when_to_use: When presenting key findings quantitatively.
common_mistakes: Reporting numbers without units or context.

function: Justifies the choice of baseline methods for comparison.
template: For baseline comparison, the industrial method ___ and the theoretical method ___ are selected.
slots: a practical baseline (e.g., widely adopted in industry)
a theoretical baseline (e.g., based on similarity theory)
when_to_use: In experimental or methodological chapters to set up comparisons.
common_mistakes: Selecting baselines that are not directly relevant or contemporary.
Failing to justify why these specific baselines were chosen.

function: Summarizes and compares existing approaches or methods from the literature.
template: A comparative analysis of ___ and ___ methods reveals ___ .
when_to_use: In literature review sections where multiple approaches are evaluated side-by-side.
common_mistakes: Listing methods without drawing meaningful comparisons.
Omitting the conclusion or insight drawn from the comparison.

function: Lists the criteria or dimensions used to evaluate prior work.
template: The evaluation of existing methodologies considers aspects such as ___ , ___ , and ___ .
when_to_use: When introducing a structured framework for assessing the literature.
common_mistakes: Using too many evaluation axes, making the comparison unclear.
Axes are not relevant to the core problem.

function: Explicitly states the research gap that the thesis addresses.
template: A significant research gap exists in the area of ___ under ___ conditions.
slots: the specific technical field or phenomenon (e.g., high-pressure centrifugal compressors, combined regulation)
the specific unaddressed condition or factor (e.g., unstable, variable operating parameters)
when_to_use: To clearly define the unmet need at the end of a literature review.
common_mistakes: The gap is too broad and not specific to the thesis contribution.
It is not logically derived from the previously discussed limitations.

function: Identifies shortcomings or gaps in prior research or methods.
template: However, existing methods for ___ have limitations, such as ___ .
slots: a specific task or adaptation goal (e.g., adapting characteristics, designing components)
the identified limitation (e.g., assumptions about similarity, neglecting stage mismatch)
when_to_use: To justify the need for new research by critiquing current approaches.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the limitation.
Not connecting the limitation to the specific research problem.

function: States how the current work is situated relative to prior studies.
template: This work extends prior research on ___ by incorporating ___ .
slots: the established topic or method (e.g., adaptation methods, gas-dynamic characteristics)
the novel aspect introduced (e.g., internal heat transfer, stage mismatch effects)
when_to_use: To differentiate the thesis contribution from existing literature.
common_mistakes: Not referencing the specific prior work being extended.

function: Introduces a classification system used to structure the analysis.
template: The classification of ___ is based on ___ .
slots: objects or systems (e.g., compressor installations, operating conditions)
criteria or factors (e.g., object levels, external factors)
when_to_use: When presenting a systematic categorization of key concepts early in a review chapter.
common_mistakes: Using overly specific examples instead of general categories.
Failing to state the basis for the classification clearly.

function: To restate and summarize the main contributions made in the work.
template: The main scientific and practical contributions of this dissertation are: 1) ___; 2) ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the final conclusion chapter.
common_mistakes: Simply copying the contributions list from the introduction verbatim.
Not synthesizing the contributions into a coherent final statement.

function: To suggest promising directions for subsequent research based on the current work.
template: Prospects for further research include ___ and the development of ___.
slots: direction 2, e.g., applying to a new domain
when_to_use: At the end of the conclusion section.
common_mistakes: Suggesting work that is trivial or already covered.
Not linking the future work to the limitations of the current study.

function: To provide an interpretation of *why* the proposed method works or achieves certain results.
template: The observed improvement in {X} can be explained by the fact that the proposed algorithm ___ and thus ___.
when_to_use: In the discussion section, to move beyond reporting numbers and explain the underlying reasons.
common_mistakes: Stating speculation as fact without evidence.
Providing a mechanism that is inconsistent with the results.

function: To describe the dataset(s) used for validation, including its source, structure, and size.
template: The proposed method was tested on data from ___, characterized by ___. The sample size comprised ___.
when_to_use: In the experimental section, to describe what data was used.
common_mistakes: Not disclosing pre-processing steps applied to the data.

function: To outline the specific case studies or experimental scenarios designed to test the method.
template: To evaluate the algorithm's effectiveness, the following scenario was designed: ___.
slots: a description of the test case or problem instance
when_to_use: When presenting specific test cases that demonstrate the method's capabilities.
common_mistakes: Designing scenarios that are too simplistic or not representative of real challenges.
Not explaining why a particular scenario was chosen.

function: To provide a high-level preview of the novel scientific and practical results.
template: The main scientific and practical results of the work are: 1) a (an) ___ for ___; 2) a (an) ___ that allows ___.
when_to_use: In the introduction, often under a heading like 'Main Results' or 'Novelty'.
common_mistakes: Simply restating the tasks list instead of highlighting the novel outputs.
Not connecting the contributions back to the research gap.

function: To clearly define the overarching goal of the entire research work.
template: The objective of this work is to develop (a) ___ to ensure ___ in the context of ___.
slots: key output, e.g., method, algorithm, system
when_to_use: In the introduction, following the problem statement and tasks list.
common_mistakes: Confusing the objective with specific tasks (the 'what' vs. the 'how').
Making the objective too narrow or too vague.

function: To state the practical importance or timeliness of the research problem.
template: The relevance of ___ is conditioned by the need to solve ___ problems in the field of ___.
when_to_use: At the beginning of the introduction to justify why the chosen research topic matters.
common_mistakes: Stating a relevance that is too broad or not directly connected to the paper's contributions.
Using vague language without specifying the actual problems.

function: To enumerate the specific tasks or steps undertaken to achieve the main objective.
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are defined: 1) to analyze ___; 2) to develop ___; 3) to create ___; 4) to verify ___.
when_to_use: Immediately after stating the objective in the introduction.
common_mistakes: Listing tasks that are too broad or not sequential.
Including tasks that do not logically lead to achieving the stated objective.

function: To describe a sequential procedure of an algorithm or method in a structured way.
template: The proposed algorithm consists of the following sequential steps: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___.
when_to_use: When formally presenting a new algorithmic procedure.
common_mistakes: Describing steps in a non-logical or non-sequential order.
Omitting crucial intermediate steps, making the procedure unclear.

function: To justify the choice or range of key parameters in a method or experiment.
template: The parameter {X} was set to ___ based on ___ to ensure ___.
when_to_use: In the method description or experimental setup section.
common_mistakes: Not stating the sensitivity of the results to these parameters.

function: To state the simplifying assumptions made during the formulation of a model or algorithm.
template: The model development is based on the following key assumptions: 1) ___; 2) ___.
slots: assumption 2, e.g., constant parameters, negligible factors
when_to_use: In the methodological chapter, before introducing the formal model.
common_mistakes: Hiding critical assumptions that significantly limit applicability.
Making assumptions that contradict the problem's real-world nature.

function: To highlight the relative improvement achieved by the proposed method over a baseline.
template: The implementation of the developed ___ allowed for reducing {X} by ___ % compared to the baseline method.
when_to_use: When emphasizing the key achievement or advantage of the new method.
common_mistakes: Cherry-picking the most favorable metric for comparison.
Not reporting the absolute values alongside the relative improvement.

function: To formally report quantitative results of an experiment or analysis.
template: The value of {X} reached ___ for the case of ___, which is ___ % higher/lower than ___.
when_to_use: In the results section to present measured outcomes.
common_mistakes: Reporting results without context or baseline comparison.
Using inconsistent significant figures or units.

function: To formulate the specific research gap or unsolved problem identified from the literature review.
template: Thus, the analysis reveals a lack of ___ methods that provide ___ under ___ conditions.
when_to_use: At the end of the problem analysis section, just before presenting the proposed approach.
common_mistakes: Stating a gap that is too broad or has already been addressed elsewhere.
Not clearly linking the gap to the stated research objective.

function: To explicitly state the shortcomings or gaps found in existing solutions or research.
template: Despite the diversity of existing approaches, they have significant limitations: ___.
slots: a description of the identified drawbacks
when_to_use: When concluding a review section, to set the stage for the proposed solution.
common_mistakes: Being overly critical without evidence or specificity.
Listing limitations that are not relevant to the scope of the current work.

function: To present a classification of existing concepts, approaches, or systems.
template: An analysis of existing ___ allows classifying them into the following main types: ___.
slots: object of classification, e.g., approaches, systems
list or description of the categories
when_to_use: In the literature review or background chapter to structure the discussion of prior work.
common_mistakes: Creating categories that are not mutually exclusive or exhaustive.
Introducing a taxonomy without clear criteria for differentiation.

template: ОБЩИЕ ВЫВОДЫ И ЗАКЛЮЧЕНИЕ.
when_to_use: Final chapter heading

function: Analyzing influence of stiffness on contact pressure
template: Анализ влияния ___ на величину ___ между ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Sensitivity analysis discussion

template: Подготовка объекта к расчётным процедуре включает ___.
when_to_use: Describing pre-processing for FEA

template: Конструкция ___ датчика обеспечивает ___.
when_to_use: Method section describing instrumentation

template: Выбор числа измерений определяется требуемой точностью ___.
when_to_use: Justifying sample size in experimental design
common_mistakes: Using arbitrary sample sizes without justification

template: Последовательность проверки справедливости закона нормального распределения экспериментальных данных.
when_to_use: Statistical validation section

template: Устройство измерительной установки включает ___.
when_to_use: Describing experimental apparatus

function: Reporting normality test for specific tire-rim pair
template: Проверка нормального распределения экспериментальных данных для шины ___ с ободом ___.
when_to_use: Reporting statistical tests per configuration

template: Методика проведения эксперимента предусматривает ___.
when_to_use: Describing step-by-step experimental procedure

template: Основные термины и определения, используемые в области ___.
when_to_use: First section of literature review for terminology establishment

template: Одним из приоритетных направлений ___ является организация производства ___.
when_to_use: Framing the research within industrial strategy

template: При ___ совершает сложное движение, состоящее из ___.
when_to_use: Introducing physical phenomena relevant to the study
common_mistakes: Missing the connection to the research problem

template: Разработка оптимальной конструкции ___, являющегося изделием массового спроса, представляет собой несомненную актуальность.
when_to_use: End of motivation paragraph to transition to problem statement
common_mistakes: Using this without establishing prior context

function: Stating practical importance of research topic
template: Все основные показатели ___ напрямую зависят от совершенства конструкции ___.
when_to_use: Introduction when linking system-level performance to component design
common_mistakes: Using vague indicators instead of concrete ones

function: Linking component to multiple system functions
template: ___ является одновременно элементом ___, ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Highlighting multifunctionality of a component in motivation
common_mistakes: Listing too many functions without prior justification

function: Stating dual domestic and export motivation
template: Разработка ___ будет не только использоваться для ___, но и поставляться на экспорт.
when_to_use: Motivation combining import substitution and export potential

function: Describing analytical description of force distribution
template: Аналитическое описание эпюры силового взаимодействия между ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Introducing a mathematical model of contact forces

template: Рационализация обода ___ проводится на основе ___.
when_to_use: Design optimization section

function: Determining total axial force from distribution
template: Определение суммарной осевой силы по эпюре распределения ___.
when_to_use: Integrating distributed loads to obtain resultant force

function: Building force distribution for second configuration
template: Построение эпюры силового взаимодействия между шиной ___ и ободом ___.
when_to_use: Results for additional tire-rim combination

template: Вывод аналитической зависимости ___ между ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Chapter introduction for analytical derivation
common_mistakes: Omitting the physical basis of the derivation

function: Stating initial assumptions for stress calculation
template: Исходные предпосылки расчёта напряжений, возникающих в ___ под действием ___.
when_to_use: Before presenting FEM or analytical stress model

function: Building force distribution for specific tire-rim combination
template: Построение эпюры силового взаимодействия между шиной ___ и ободом ___.
when_to_use: Presenting results for a specific configuration

function: Comparing results before and after design optimization
template: Сопоставление полученных результатов до и после рационализации сечения ___.
when_to_use: Presenting comparison of original vs optimized designs
common_mistakes: Not controlling for changed boundary conditions

function: Analyzing normal force distribution on rim
template: Анализ эпюры нормальных сил, воспринимаемых ободом от ___.
when_to_use: Interpreting computed force distributions

function: Analyzing problem of tire-rim force interaction
template: Анализ работ, посвящённых проблеме ___ между ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Opening literature review subsection

template: Нагруженность ___ при ___ исследуется с учётом ___.
when_to_use: Framing prior work on loading analysis

function: Noting insufficient study of parameter influence
template: Влияние ___ на величину и характер ___ изучено недостаточно.
when_to_use: Identifying specific research gap in survey
common_mistakes: Too broad gap statement without narrowing to measurable aspect

function: Identifying gap in prior experimental methods
template: Экспериментальное определение ___ [требует/не учитывает] ___.
slots: силового взаимодействия между шиной и ободом
when_to_use: When prior work has methodological limitations
common_mistakes: Presenting gaps without citing specific studies

function: Identifying insufficient depth of parameter study
template: Влияние ___ на величину и характер силового взаимодействия с ___ исследовано в недостаточной мере.
when_to_use: Gap identification in survey
common_mistakes: Not citing who did partial studies

function: Structuring literature review by research stages
template: Этапы совершенствования конструкции ___.
when_to_use: Chapter overview for literature review sections
common_mistakes: Listing without chronological or thematic logic

function: 列举为实现研究目标所需完成的具体子任务。
template: Для достижения данной цели поставлены следующие задачи: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___; 4) ___.
when_to_use: 在引言或单独的‘任务’章节，将总目标分解为可操作的研究步骤。
common_mistakes: 任务描述与研究目标或章节内容不对应；任务表述为状态而非行动（如‘研究X’而非‘分析X的特性’）。

function: 概述论文的章节结构及各章核心内容。
template: Во введении обоснована актуальность... Глава 1 посвящена ___。Глава 2 анализирует ___。Глава 3 исследует ___。В заключении ___。
when_to_use: 在引言结尾部分，为读者提供论文的路线图。
common_mistakes: 章节描述过于简略，未点明核心分析视角；结构描述与实际章节标题完全重复，缺乏概括。

template: Экспериментальные данные получены на ___ образцах из стали ___ размером ___.
when_to_use: Describing the experimental dataset

template: Основные научные результаты, выносимые на защиту: ___.
when_to_use: Previewing defended contributions
common_mistakes: Contributions not novel or not directly derived from the work

function: State industrial motivation for the study
template: Повышение ___ является актуальной задачей промышленного производства.
when_to_use: Opening section motivating why the research topic matters industrially
common_mistakes: Too generic without specifying the application domain

template: Целью работы является исследование ___ при ___.
when_to_use: Formulating the main objective
common_mistakes: Objective not measurable or too vague

template: В настоящее время недостаточно изучены закономерности ___ при ___ условиях.
when_to_use: Stating the research problem
common_mistakes: Problem too broad or already well-known

template: Актуальность работы обусловлена необходимостью ___ для ___.
when_to_use: Introducing relevance paragraph

template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___.
when_to_use: Enumerating specific research tasks
common_mistakes: Tasks that don't logically lead to the objective

template: Диссертация состоит из ___, введения, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: Describing thesis organization

template: Для оценки влияния ___ на результат проведены эксперименты с фиксацией ___ при вариации ___.
when_to_use: Planning ablation experiments to isolate factor effects

template: Решение задачи осуществляется в следующей последовательности: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___.
when_to_use: Describing computational algorithm steps
common_mistakes: Steps not reproducible from the description

template: Вычислительная сложность алгоритма составляет O(___) при размере сетки ___.
when_to_use: Reporting computational complexity of the numerical method

template: Моделирование выполнено в программном комплексе ___ с использованием сетки из ___ элементов.
when_to_use: Providing software and implementation details

template: Входными параметрами процесса являются ___ и ___, выходными — ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Defining process inputs and outputs

template: Эксперименты проводились при следующих параметрах: ___ = ___, ___ = ___, ___ = ___.
when_to_use: Reporting experimental parameter settings

template: Методика исследования включает следующие этапы: ___, ___, ___.
when_to_use: Giving an overview of the experimental methodology
common_mistakes: Missing critical steps in the pipeline

template: При данных условиях обработки стабильность ___ обеспечивается в диапазоне от ___ до ___.
when_to_use: Making conservative claims about process stability

template: При моделировании приняты следующие допущения: ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Presenting modeling assumptions explicitly

template: Граничные условия задачи задаются на поверхностях: ___, ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Specifying boundary conditions for a simulation

template: Условие ___ накладывает ограничение на ___: ___.
when_to_use: Presenting physical or mathematical constraints

template: Обозначим через ___ величину ___, а через ___ — ___.
when_to_use: Introducing key symbols and notation

template: Параметр ___ определяется из условия ___ по результатам ___.
when_to_use: Explaining how model parameters are identified

template: Для упрощения расчёта принято, что ___ остаётся постоянным в интервале ___.
when_to_use: Justifying simplifying assumptions in the model

template: Основным источником погрешности модели является ___.
when_to_use: Discussing sources of uncertainty in modeling

template: Температура задаётся в ___ (К), время — в ___ (с), толщина слоя — в ___ (мкм).
when_to_use: Specifying units for physical quantities

template: В качестве базового для сравнения принят метод ___, поскольку он ___.
when_to_use: Justifying why a particular baseline method was chosen
common_mistakes: Baseline not representative of current practice

template: Сравнение показывает, что метод ___ обеспечивает ___ по сравнению с методом ___.
when_to_use: Comparing different techniques in the literature review

function: Define axes for evaluating prior methods
template: Критериями оценки эффективности ___ служат: ___, ___ и ___.
when_to_use: Defining evaluation criteria for comparing methods
common_mistakes: Criteria not measurable or not standard in the field

template: В доступной литературе отсутствуют данные о ___ при ___.
when_to_use: Identifying a specific research gap
common_mistakes: Gap that is already addressed in recent papers

template: Однако указанные работы не учитывают влияния ___ на ___ при ___.
when_to_use: Identifying gaps or limitations in prior studies

function: Position own work relative to literature
template: Настоящая работа дополняет имеющиеся сведения путём ___.
when_to_use: Positioning the thesis contribution within the field

template: Существующие методы ___ можно классифицировать по ___ на следующие группы: ___.
when_to_use: Creating a classification of reviewed methods

template: В качестве эталона для сравнения использовался модулятор на основе ___.
when_to_use: Baseline description in experiments
common_mistakes: Baseline not fabricated under same conditions

template: В эксперименте использовались образцы ___ с размерами активной области ___.
when_to_use: Experimental setup description

template: Ключевыми метриками оценки являются: вносимые потери ___, глубина модуляции ___.
when_to_use: Metrics definition in experimental chapter
common_mistakes: Metrics not standard or not clearly defined

template: Для обеспечения воспроизводимости результатов каждый эксперимент повторялся ___ раз.
when_to_use: Reproducibility statement in experiments

template: Эксперимент проводился при следующих условиях: длина волны излучения ___, температура ___.
when_to_use: Defining experimental conditions

template: Основными результатами работы являются: разработка модели ___ и экспериментальное подтверждение ___.
when_to_use: End of introduction summarizing contributions

function: State research motivation from industry need
template: Развитие фотонных интегральных схем предъявляет жёсткие требования к ___ модуляторам.
when_to_use: Opening paragraph of introduction motivating the work

template: Целью работы является разработка и исследование методов создания электрооптического модулятора на основе ___ для фотонных интегральных схем.
when_to_use: Explicit objective statement
common_mistakes: Objective too narrow or too broad

template: Основной проблемой является отсутствие методов создания модулятора с одновременно низкими ___ и высокой ___.
when_to_use: Problem statement in introduction
common_mistakes: Listing too many problems without prioritization

template: Актуальность данной работы обусловлена необходимостью снижения ___ в электрооптических модуляторах.
when_to_use: Introduction section establishing relevance
common_mistakes: Vague relevance statements without quantitative backing

template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: ___
when_to_use: Enumeration of research tasks in introduction
common_mistakes: Tasks not logically connected to objective

template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: Last paragraph of introduction
common_mistakes: Overly detailed chapter summaries in structure description

template: Для исследования влияния ___ на ___ было изготовлено ___ серии образцов с различными значениями ___.
when_to_use: Describing experimental variation strategy

template: На первом этапе выполняется расчёт ___ с использованием метода ___.
when_to_use: Describing simulation methodology
common_mistakes: Not specifying software or numerical method

template: Время расчёта одной конфигурации составляло порядка ___ на вычислительном стенде с ___.
when_to_use: Computational details section

template: Технологический процесс изготовления включал этапы: ___.
when_to_use: Technology process description

template: Значение ___ было выбрано равным ___ на основании ___.
when_to_use: Explaining parameter choices in methodology

template: Методика исследования включает следующие этапы: математическое моделирование ___, изготовление ___, экспериментальное исследование ___.
when_to_use: Methodology overview at chapter start

template: Предлагаемая конструкция обеспечивает стабильную работу при ___ в диапазоне ___.
when_to_use: Reliability discussion in methods

template: При моделировании предполагается, что ___ является ___.
when_to_use: Model assumptions section

template: На границе раздела ___ и ___ выполняются условия непрерывности тангенциальных компонент.
when_to_use: Electromagnetic modeling section

template: Значение ___ не может превышать ___ из-за ограничения ___.
when_to_use: Constraints discussion in modeling

template: Обозначим через ___ величину ___.
when_to_use: Notation introduction in modeling chapter

template: Параметр ___ определяется из условия ___.
when_to_use: Parameter determination in modeling
common_mistakes: Not explaining how parameters were chosen

template: Для упрощения расчёта пренебрегаем влиянием ___ на ___.
when_to_use: Simplification justification in modeling

template: Все линейные размеры приведены в ___.
when_to_use: Before presenting numerical results of modeling

template: В качестве базового для сравнения выбран модулятор на основе ___ в силу его широкого применения.
when_to_use: Selecting baselines in comparative analysis

template: Сравнительный анализ показал, что модуляторы на основе ___ обладают преимуществами по ___ по сравнению с ___.
when_to_use: Comparison paragraph in literature review

template: Оценка модуляторов проводится по следующим основным параметрам: ___.
when_to_use: Defining comparison framework in survey

template: В настоящее время остаётся нерешённой проблема ___ для ___.
when_to_use: Transition from survey to problem statement

template: Основным ограничением существующих решений является ___.
when_to_use: Critical analysis paragraph in survey

function: Position own work relative to prior art
template: В отличие от работ [___], в данной диссертации предлагается подход на основе ___.
when_to_use: Positioning paragraph after survey

template: Общая классификация интегральных оптических модуляторов основана на ___ эффектах.
when_to_use: Opening of literature review chapter

function: Summarizing a key point of the work.
template: Одной из видов деятельности является ___ , которая является активным «проводником» ___
when_to_use: To recap a central concept or argument in the conclusion.

function: Providing a cautious interpretation of a phenomenon.
template: Явление ___ , по-видимому, связано с ___
when_to_use: To offer a plausible but not definitive explanation for a finding.
common_mistakes: Using hedging language excessively, making the claim unclear.

function: Discussing a trade-off between development and risk.
template: При этом ___ , вместе с тем ___
when_to_use: To analyze the dual-sided nature of technological progress.
common_mistakes: Presenting trade-offs as absolute and deterministic.

template: Под ___ понимается ___
when_to_use: To establish a clear definition for a core term in the thesis.
common_mistakes: Providing a definition that is too narrow or too broad for the context.

function: Describing the core problem or tension to be studied.
template: В условиях современности нарастают ___ , порождая многочисленные риски и противоречия.
when_to_use: To define the central problem motivating the thesis.
common_mistakes: Listing problems without connecting them to the main research question.

function: Stating the importance of the research topic.
template: Актуальность темы (исследования) обусловлена ___
when_to_use: In the introduction to establish why the research topic matters.
common_mistakes: Using overly vague justifications like 'it is important'.

function: Introducing a core theoretical assumption of the analysis.
template: Взаимосвязь (элементов) осуществляется через ___
when_to_use: To state a foundational premise of the theoretical framework.
common_mistakes: Stating assumptions as proven facts without justification.

function: Acknowledging a simplification in the model.
template: Вместе с тем, ___ , что требует анализа.
when_to_use: To note a simplification or a resulting challenge within the proposed model.
common_mistakes: Failing to connect the simplification to the research goals.

function: Highlighting a gap in prior representation or research.
template: Репрезентации современного общества (такие как ___) связаны непосредственно с ___ , но ___ не исследованы.
when_to_use: To point out what existing labels or theories overlook.
common_mistakes: Claiming a gap without referencing specific prior works.

template: В рамках современной технико-технологической деятельности субъектов общества развивается ___
when_to_use: To categorize or introduce different aspects of a broader field being reviewed.
common_mistakes: Creating overly rigid or overlapping categories.

function: Opening a new section by signaling its focus.
template: В теоретическом аспекте проблема актуализируется ___
when_to_use: To begin a new subsection or paragraph that shifts focus to theory.
common_mistakes: Abruptly jumping into a new topic without a linker.

function: 用于总结章节或全文的核心结论
template: Таким образом, проведённый анализ позволяет утверждать, что ___ .
slots: интеллектуальная экономика является функциональной подсистемой информационного общества
when_to_use: 结论章节或小结段落开头。
common_mistakes: 总结过于简略，未概括前文分析的主要发现

function: 探讨特定现象（如智能经济）在宏观系统（信息社会）中的功能定位
template: [Интеллектуальная экономика] рассматривается как [функциональная подсистема] ___.
when_to_use: 讨论章节中，阐述研究对象在理论体系中的结构性角色。
common_mistakes: 忽略‘как’后面的准确定义性描述

function: 引入并界定论文中的核心理论模型
template: [Формирование модели интеллектуальной экономики] является ___ .
when_to_use: 在章节标题或引言中，界定研究主题的性质。
common_mistakes: 使用‘важной’等评价性词汇代替‘является’这类中性界定

function: 预告论文将从哲学角度分析社会不平等等问题
template: Философский анализ [социального неравенства] в парадигме ___ является одной из ключевых задач.
when_to_use: 在绪论末尾或章节介绍中，预览论文将探讨的具体哲学问题。
common_mistakes: 表述过于笼统，未明确在何种‘парадигме’下分析

function: 陈述学术研究持续关注的长期兴趣点
template: В общественных науках начиная с [последней трети XX столетия] существует повышенный интерес к анализу проблемы ___ .
when_to_use: 导言中介绍研究问题在学术界的长期关注度。
common_mistakes: 时间状语使用过于笼统的‘давно’

function: 明确指明论文核心的哲学-社会学分析任务
template: Насущным вопросом исследования является ___ .
when_to_use: 紧随问题陈述之后，明确论文的具体分析目标。
common_mistakes: 使用过于宽泛的表述，如‘изучение вопроса’

function: 引出当前社会变革所带来的核心研究问题
template: Глубинные изменения в социуме, происходящие под влиянием ___, являются объектом всестороннего философского анализа.
when_to_use: 从宏观社会变革过渡到具体哲学分析对象。
common_mistakes: 主语‘изменения’缺少明确的限定词，如‘в социуме’

function: 阐明研究主题在当代背景下的重要性与现实基础
template: В начале XXI века ___ становятся [технологической/практической] основой развития информационного общества.
when_to_use: 用于论文导言开头，建立研究主题与宏观时代背景的联系。
common_mistakes: 罗列技术名词而未建立其与主题的逻辑联系
堆砌术语导致句子冗长

function: 描述数字技术持续整合并引发社会变革的动态过程
template: Современные цифровые технологии, базируясь на [возрастающих мощностях], находятся в состоянии непрерывной интеграции, обусловливая трансформацию ___.
slots: общества, экономики и духовной жизни человека
when_to_use: 在引言中深入阐述技术发展动态及其广泛影响。
common_mistakes: 将‘находятся в состоянии’简化为‘постоянно интегрируются’，失去过程感

function: 概括数字化转型在信息社会发展中的阶段意义
template: Цифровая трансформация знаменует ___ в развитии информационного общества.
when_to_use: 为研究主题赋予历史阶段性意义。
common_mistakes: 使用‘важный’等主观形容词代替‘новый’这类客观界定

function: 指出新现实对人类能力的具体影响领域
template: Новая [цифровая интеллектуальная] реальность приводит к изменению компетенций человека при ___, ___, ___.
when_to_use: 具体化信息社会变革对人的影响，使研究问题更贴近经验层面。
common_mistakes: 列举的领域过于抽象或重复

function: 概述论文主要章节的核心研究任务
template: [Глава 1] посвящена концептуальному анализу ___ ; [Глава 2] – философским проблемам формирования ___.
when_to_use: 绪论中介绍论文结构时，概括各章内容。
common_mistakes: 仅重复章节标题，未提炼其核心任务

function: 从技术-工艺角度介绍智能经济作为经济活动的研究
template: Технико-технологические характеристики [интеллектуальной экономики] как экономической деятельности на основе ___ исследовали ___, ___ и др.
when_to_use: 在文献综述中，介绍关于研究对象（智能经济）在具体技术实现层面的研究。
common_mistakes: 遗漏了‘как экономической деятельности’这一关键限定

function: 通过不同学科视角的并列，暗示综合研究的必要性
template: Философские проблемы ___ рассматриваются в работах ___, ___ и др.
when_to_use: 综述中展示特定视角（如哲学）的研究现状，为下文综合视角铺垫。
common_mistakes: 未能清晰界定所综述问题的学科边界

function: 通过列举具体的技术和现象，为哲学分析提供经验基础
template: Технологической основой развития информационного общества становятся ___, ___, ___ и другие современные технологии.
when_to_use: 引言或问题提出部分，列举构成研究背景的具体技术要素。
common_mistakes: 列举的技术过于陈旧或不具代表性

function: 介绍研究某一具体方面（如社会-经济特征）的已有学者
template: [Социально-экономические/Технико-технологические] характеристики ___ изучали такие исследователи, как ___, ___ и др.
when_to_use: 文献综述中，分类介绍已有的研究贡献者。
common_mistakes: 列出大量作者姓名而未明确其贡献的具体方面

function: 列出研究某特定主题（如智能经济模型）的社会科学代表学者
template: [Социально-экономические/Философские] проблемы ___ рассматривались в трудах ___, ___ и др.
when_to_use: 文献综述中，针对论文核心研究对象，梳理已有社会-经济或哲学层面的研究。
common_mistakes: 将不同细分领域的作者不加区分地混在一个列表中

function: 引导读者从社会科学研究过渡到哲学层面的分析需求
template: В свою очередь, насущным вопросом исследования является ___ .
when_to_use: 段落之间，将广泛的社会背景讨论聚焦到论文的具体研究问题上。
common_mistakes: 滥用‘В свою очередь’，仅用于并列而非逻辑递进

function: 开启一个讨论特定学科视角的文献综述小节
template: С точки зрения [социологии и экономической теории] исследования того, как ___ влияют на ___, предпринимали ___.
when_to_use: 文献综述章节中，引入一个新的研究视角或子领域。
common_mistakes: 句子结构过于复杂，主语‘исследования’与谓语‘предпринимали’距离过远

function: Providing a deeper explanation of the underlying physical mechanism.
template: The observed improvement can be attributed to the ___ mechanism, where ___ leads to enhanced ___.
when_to_use: When interpreting *why* the results occurred, linking phenomena to the observed performance.

function: Discussing inherent trade-offs in the proposed approach.
template: A key trade-off exists between ___ and ___, where optimizing one leads to a reduction in the other.
when_to_use: When acknowledging that the proposed solution involves design compromises.
common_mistakes: Not suggesting how to balance the trade-off

function: Describing the dataset or experimental data collected.
template: The experimental dataset consists of ___ measurements of ___ under varying conditions of ___.
when_to_use: When summarizing the nature and scope of the data used for validation or analysis.
common_mistakes: Not specifying data range or variability

function: Defining the performance metrics used for evaluation.
template: Performance was evaluated using the following metrics: ___, which measures ___, and ___, which quantifies ___.
when_to_use: When formally introducing the criteria against which the proposed method is judged.
common_mistakes: Metrics not directly related to the objective

template: To ensure reproducibility, the experiments were conducted under controlled conditions of ___ and repeated ___ times.
when_to_use: When stating the measures taken to make the experimental results reliable and repeatable.

function: Stating the research motivation or problem importance.
template: The development of ___ is of significant importance due to ___ in the field of ___.
when_to_use: When introducing the fundamental reason or importance behind conducting the study.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the problem
Not connecting the motivation to a specific field or application

template: The primary objective of this work is to develop and validate ___ for ___.
when_to_use: When stating the main goal that the entire thesis is structured to achieve.
common_mistakes: Not making it a single, clear statement

function: Formally stating the core research problem.
template: The core challenge addressed in this work is the development of ___ capable of ___.
when_to_use: When explicitly defining the central problem that the thesis aims to solve.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the key innovation or capability

function: Listing the specific research tasks or steps.
template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks were solved: 1) ___, 2) ___, 3) ___.
when_to_use: When breaking down the main objective into concrete, actionable research steps.

function: Describing the sequential steps of an algorithm or procedure.
template: The calculation algorithm proceeds as follows: Step 1, ___; Step 2, ___; Step 3, ___.
when_to_use: When detailing a computational or experimental procedure in a clear, step-by-step manner.
common_mistakes: Steps are not in logical order

template: The experimental setup comprised ___ connected to ___ via ___.
when_to_use: When describing the physical or software implementation, focusing on practical configuration.
common_mistakes: Being too vague about the setup

function: Specifying how key parameters are set or determined.
template: The value of ___ was determined based on ___ and set to ___ for all subsequent analyses.
when_to_use: When explaining the rationale behind choosing specific values for critical model or experimental parameters.

function: Providing a high-level overview of the proposed method or system.
template: The proposed system operates in three stages: first, ___; second, ___; and finally, ___.
when_to_use: When introducing the methodology section by summarizing the entire process flow before diving into details.
common_mistakes: The overview is too detailed and loses clarity

function: Stating the fundamental assumptions underlying the model.
template: The analysis is based on the key assumption that ___, which allows for ___.
when_to_use: When defining the idealizations or simplifications made to make the problem tractable.
common_mistakes: Choosing unrealistic assumptions that invalidate the model

function: Introducing key mathematical or symbolic notation.
template: Let ___ denote the ___, and let ___ represent the ___.
when_to_use: When formally defining the variables and symbols used in the following mathematical derivations.
common_mistakes: Failing to define a symbol before its first use

function: Analyzing specific, illustrative cases from the results.
template: Case study analysis of Scenario ___ reveals that the primary factor influencing ___ is ___.
when_to_use: When using a specific example from the data to illustrate a general finding or mechanism.
common_mistakes: Choosing an outlier case not representative of the general trend

function: Reporting the improvement achieved over a baseline.
template: The proposed method achieved a ___ improvement in ___ compared to the baseline approach.
when_to_use: When highlighting the quantitative gain of your method over existing solutions.
common_mistakes: Not specifying the baseline for comparison
Overstating the significance of minor improvements

function: Identifying the specific research gap filled by the thesis.
template: Therefore, a significant gap exists in the knowledge concerning ___, which this work addresses by ___.
when_to_use: When explicitly stating what is missing from the current state of the art and how your work contributes.
common_mistakes: The gap is too obvious or trivial
The connection between the gap and your work is weak

function: Pointing out limitations or gaps in existing work.
template: A critical review of prior work reveals key limitations in ___, specifically ___.
when_to_use: When establishing the novelty of your work by showing what previous research did not adequately address.
common_mistakes: Not linking the limitation directly to your research gap

template: Экспериментальные данные получены на стенде ___ при ___
when_to_use: Describing experimental data sources

template: В качестве показателя эффективности используется ___
when_to_use: Defining evaluation metrics
common_mistakes: Metrics not directly related to objectives

template: Экспериментальные сценарии включают ___ при ___
when_to_use: Defining test scenarios
common_mistakes: Scenarios not representative of real conditions

function: Preview main contributions of the thesis
template: Основными результатами работы являются ___ и ___
when_to_use: End of introduction section
common_mistakes: Contributions not distinguishable from existing work

function: Statement of current relevance/importance of the research topic
template: В настоящее время актуальной является задача ___
when_to_use: Opening section of introduction to establish relevance
common_mistakes: Using overly generic statements without domain specifics

function: Define the object and subject of research
template: Объектом исследования является ___; предметом — ___
when_to_use: Formal delineation of research scope
common_mistakes: Object and subject too similar or overlapping

template: Разработать и обосновать ___ при ___
when_to_use: Formulating the primary research goal
common_mistakes: Objective too broad or not measurable

function: Describe the core problem that motivates the research
template: Существенной проблемой является снижение ___ за счёт ___
when_to_use: Introducing the main problem in the introduction
common_mistakes: Vague problem statement without quantitative indicators

template: Задача снижения стоимости ___ актуальна для ___
when_to_use: Establishing practical relevance

template: Разработать сценарии и ___ модели развития ___ при ___
when_to_use: Listing concrete tasks in the introduction
common_mistakes: Tasks not aligned with chapters or objectives

template: Провести экспериментальное исследование ___ на стенде ___
when_to_use: Describing experimental objectives
common_mistakes: No connection between experiments and model validation

function: Describe the structure of the dissertation
template: Диссертация состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы
when_to_use: Structural overview at end of introduction
common_mistakes: Missing page counts or chapter summaries

function: Describe what is varied to test method components
template: Для оценки влияния ___ проведены расчёты при ___
when_to_use: Planning sensitivity or ablation studies

template: На первом этапе выполняется ___, на втором — ___
when_to_use: Detailing algorithmic procedure
common_mistakes: Steps too abstract without implementation details

template: Реализация ___ выполнена с использованием ___
when_to_use: Describing practical implementation

function: Define inputs and outputs of the method
template: На входе методики задаются: ___, ___; на выходе — ___
when_to_use: Specifying method interface

function: Explain how method parameters are set
template: Значение параметра ___ принимается равным ___ на основании ___
when_to_use: Justifying parameter choices in methodology
common_mistakes: No physical justification for parameter values

function: Overview of the calculation methodology pipeline
template: Методика расчёта включает следующие этапы: ___, ___, ___
when_to_use: Presenting the overall methodology structure

function: Make conservative claims about method stability
template: Предлагаемая методика обеспечивает ___ при условии ___
when_to_use: Stating method reliability conditions

function: State physical assumptions of the model
template: Приняты следующие допущения: ___, ___, ___
when_to_use: Defining model assumptions section
common_mistakes: Assumptions not justified or too restrictive

template: Граничные условия задаются на поверхности ___ в виде ___
when_to_use: Specifying boundary conditions for mathematical model

function: Define constraints on the model domain
template: Ограничение на ___ задаётся условием ___
when_to_use: Specifying model constraints
common_mistakes: Constraints too tight for practical cases

template: Обозначим через ___ величину ___
when_to_use: Introducing symbols in mathematical formulation

function: Discuss which parameters can be identified from data
template: Параметр ___ определяется из условия ___
when_to_use: Parameter identification discussion

function: Describe simplifications made in the model
template: Для упрощения расчёта принято, что ___ является ___
when_to_use: Explaining model simplifications

template: Величина ___ выражается в ___
when_to_use: Defining units for key parameters

function: Justify selection of baseline for comparison
template: В качестве базового варианта выбран ___ вследствие ___
when_to_use: Selecting reference configurations for comparison

template: В отличие от ___, ___ обеспечивает ___
when_to_use: Comparing competing solutions in the literature

template: Для сравнения подходов используются критерии: ___, ___, ___
when_to_use: Setting up comparative analysis framework
common_mistakes: Criteria not relevant to the problem

function: State what is missing in prior work
template: Отсутствуют данные по ___ для условий ___
when_to_use: Highlighting specific knowledge gaps
common_mistakes: Gap that cannot be addressed by this work

template: В существующих работах недостаточно исследовано ___ при ___
when_to_use: Identifying research gaps
common_mistakes: Too broad gap statement without specifics

function: Position current work relative to literature
template: Настоящая работа дополняет исследования ___ путём ___
when_to_use: Connecting to and differentiating from prior work

template: Существующие технологии ___ классифицируются по ___ на ___
when_to_use: Literature review taxonomy section

function: 再次强调论文的主要贡献
template: Основными вкладами диссертации являются: ___.
when_to_use: 结论部分，在总结之后
common_mistakes: 与引言中的贡献描述完全雷同

function: 提出未来可能的研究方向
template: Перспективы дальнейших исследований связаны с ___.
when_to_use: 结论末尾
common_mistakes: 未来方向与本文工作脱节

function: 总结论文的核心工作内容
template: В работе были исследованы и предложены ___.
when_to_use: 结论开头部分
common_mistakes: 简单重复摘要内容，无新信息

function: 对实验结果背后的机理进行解释
template: Такой результат может быть объяснен тем, что ___.
when_to_use: 讨论部分开头，分析结果出现的原因
common_mistakes: 解释过于表面化或缺乏证据支持

function: 讨论结果对某个参数或条件的敏感程度
template: Точность оценки чувствительна к изменению ___.
when_to_use: 讨论部分，分析方法的鲁棒性
common_mistakes: 仅定性描述敏感性，未给出量化分析

function: 讨论方法设计中存在的权衡
template: Улучшение точности в ___ достигается ценой ___.
when_to_use: 讨论部分，全面评价方法的优缺点

function: 说明用于对比的基准方法
template: Предложенный метод сравнивался с ___.
when_to_use: 实验设计部分，用于定义对比基线
common_mistakes: 基准方法已过时或不具代表性

function: 描述实验所用的数据集或数据来源
template: Для экспериментов использовались данные, полученные с ___.
when_to_use: 实验部分开头，介绍数据基础
common_mistakes: 数据来源描述不清，影响可复现性

function: 定义用于评估方法性能的指标
template: Для оценки точности использовалась метрика: ___.
when_to_use: 实验部分开头，在介绍场景后立即说明
common_mistakes: 选用的指标无法反映方法的核心优势

function: 描述实验的具体场景或工况设置
template: Эксперимент проводился в следующих условиях: ___.
when_to_use: 设计和描述实验方案时
common_mistakes: 场景设计过于理想化，脱离实际

function: 预告论文的主要理论或技术贡献
template: Основными результатами работы являются: ___.
when_to_use: 引言中，在研究任务和结构介绍之前或之后
common_mistakes: 贡献描述过于技术化，不易理解

function: 明确论文的主要研究目标
template: Целью данной работы является разработка методов и алгоритмов для ___.
when_to_use: 引言或问题陈述后，明确提出研究目的
common_mistakes: 目标与后续章节内容不匹配

function: 陈述研究要解决的核心问题及其挑战
template: В контексте ___ возникает проблема ___.
when_to_use: 引言部分描述技术难题或研究空白时
common_mistakes: 问题描述过于笼统，未与具体技术难点关联

function: 列举为实现目标需要完成的具体研究任务
template: Для достижения поставленной цели необходимо решить следующие задачи: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___.
when_to_use: 目标陈述后，用于结构化后续研究工作
common_mistakes: 任务描述过于抽象，缺乏可操作性

function: 概述论文的整体结构和各章内容
template: Диссертационная работа состоит из введения, ___ глав, заключения и списка литературы.
when_to_use: 引言末尾，用于过渡到正文
common_mistakes: 结构描述与目录不完全一致

function: 分步描述算法的实现细节
template: Алгоритм состоит из следующих шагов: Шаг 1: ___. Шаг 2: ___.
when_to_use: 详细描述一个具体算法时
common_mistakes: 步骤之间缺乏逻辑连贯性

function: 明确定义算法或方法的输入和输出
template: Входными данными алгоритма являются: ___. Выходом является: ___.
when_to_use: 描述具体算法时，开头部分
common_mistakes: 输入输出描述与后续公式或描述不匹配

function: 说明方法中关键参数的设置或选择依据
template: Значение параметра ___ выбирается равным ___.
when_to_use: 介绍实验设置或算法配置时
common_mistakes: 参数选择缺乏依据或敏感性分析

function: 概述整个方法或算法的流程概览
template: Общий подход включает следующие этапы: 1) ___; 2) ___; 3) ___.
when_to_use: 方法章节开始，用于总览后续详细描述
common_mistakes: 流程过于复杂，缺乏层次感

function: 声明模型建立或问题分析所基于的基本假设
template: Предполагается, что ___.
when_to_use: 建模或理论推导开始前
common_mistakes: 关键假设在后续分析中被违反而未说明

function: 描述系统或模型的有效工作范围或边界条件
template: Данный метод применим при условии, что ___.
when_to_use: 提出新模型或算法后，说明其适用性
common_mistakes: 未明确说明限制条件，导致误用

function: 报告相对于基准方法的性能提升
template: Предложенный метод обеспечил улучшение по сравнению с ___ на ___.
when_to_use: 结果分析部分，强调本方法的优越性
common_mistakes: 未说明改进的统计显著性

function: 以数值形式报告实验结果
template: Полученное значение метрики ___ составило ___.
when_to_use: 结果分析部分，汇报具体实验数据
common_mistakes: 只报告最终值，不报告多次实验的方差或分布

function: 对比两种或多种方法或技术的优劣
template: В отличие от метода ___, предложенный подход ___.
when_to_use: 方法介绍部分，用于突出本方法创新点
common_mistakes: 对比维度不清晰或不公平

function: 明确指出研究领域中尚未解决的问题或空白
template: Вместе с тем, остается нерешенной задача ___.
when_to_use: 文献综述末尾，引出本文研究的必要性
common_mistakes: 所指的‘空白’在本文中并未真正解决

function: 指出现有研究或方法的不足
template: Существующие методы обладают рядом ограничений: ___.
when_to_use: 文献综述或问题陈述部分，分析现有解决方案的缺点
common_mistakes: 仅批评而不提供改进方向

function: 结束一个章节或段落的总结句
template: Таким образом, ___.
when_to_use: 章节或重要段落的结尾

function: 开启新章节或子章节的引导句
template: В данной главе рассматривается ___.
when_to_use: 每一章的开头
common_mistakes: 开篇语与章节标题重复

template: Baseline tests are conducted on ___ specimens under ___ loading with a contact pressure of ___ MPa.
when_to_use: Defining reference experiments for comparison

template: The experimental campaign yielded ___ data points for ___ material at ___ different stress levels ranging from ___ to ___ MPa.
when_to_use: Summarising collected data before analysis

function: Define the performance metric for experiments
template: The primary metric is the number of cycles to the onset of ___, defined as the first appearance of ___ on the contact surface.
when_to_use: Setting up the response variable for experiments

template: Each test is repeated ___ times; the scatter of results does not exceed ___% of the mean value.
when_to_use: Reporting statistical reliability of experiments

function: Design test scenarios covering relevant conditions
template: Three loading scenarios are considered: (1) ___; (2) ___; (3) ___.
when_to_use: Planning experiments that span the operating envelope

function: Highlight the limitation of existing standard methods
template: Standard methods in which ___ stresses are compared with the ___ endurance limit are well established, yet their main drawback is the need for ___ experiments that often prevent timely ___ of a designed component.
when_to_use: Transitioning from problem statement to research gap
common_mistakes: Not specifying what kind of experiments

template: The objective of this work is to improve methods for designing ___ parts by developing a ___ criterion comparable with standard ___ characteristics.
when_to_use: End of introduction to clearly state aim

function: State the core problem caused by inadequate prediction
template: Inaccurate prediction of the onset of ___ leads to incorrect ___ estimation, premature failures, and consequently to ___ losses due to equipment downtime.
when_to_use: Stating the engineering problem after motivation

function: Establish practical relevance of research topic
template: An important feature of modern ___ machines is the diversity of components that operate under ___ loading conditions not described by standard ___ schemes.
when_to_use: Opening paragraph to justify why the topic matters in practice
common_mistakes: Being too vague about which machines
Failing to specify what standard schemes lack

template: To achieve this objective, the following tasks are addressed: (1) ___; (2) ___; (3) ___; (4) ___.
when_to_use: Structuring the research programme after stating the objective

function: Describe the structure of the dissertation
template: The thesis consists of an introduction, ___ chapters, general conclusions, a list of abbreviations, and a bibliography comprising ___ sources.
when_to_use: End of introduction for structural overview

function: Describe the ablation or parametric study plan
template: To isolate the effect of ___, we vary ___ while keeping ___ constant across ___ test configurations.
when_to_use: Planning sensitivity or ablation studies
common_mistakes: Varying too many factors at once

template: Step 1: ___ the ___ specimen; Step 2: apply ___ loading up to ___ cycles; Step 3: record ___.
